kikuyu: Kũgwatia Matawa Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ, 2“Arĩria Harũni, ũmwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũrĩbangaga matawa marĩa mũgwanja, mabangage nĩguo ũtheri wamo waragĩre mwena wa na mbere wa mũtĩ ũcio wa kũigĩrĩrwo matawa.’ ”
english: Then let them take a young bull and its meal offering, fine flour mixed with oil; and another young bull you shall take for a sin offering.

kikuyu: Wee wathinĩkanirie nginya kũrĩa kũriku, o gatagatĩ ka iria rĩrĩa inene, * 1:2 Itũũra rĩa Nineve rĩakirwo nĩ Nimurodi ( ), na rĩgĩtuuo itũũra inene rĩa Ashuri nĩ Senakeribu.
english: For you threw me into the depths, in the heart of the seas. The flood was all around me. All your waves and your billows passed over me.

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũrĩ na ũmenyo aragia ciugo athimĩte, nake mũndũ ũrĩ na ũtaũku aikaraga ahooreire.
english: He who spares his words has knowledge. He who is even tempered is a man of understanding.

kikuyu: no nĩmũregaga gũũka kũrĩ niĩ mũgĩe na muoyo.
english: Yet you will not come to me, that you may have life.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkaara riũa rĩa kũhũithia maaĩ makuo! Namo nĩmakaahũa biũ. Nĩgũkorwo ũcio nĩ bũrũri ũiyũrĩte ngai cia mĩhianano, nao andũ akuo nĩmagũrũkĩtio nĩyo.
english: A drought is on her waters, and they will be dried up; for it is a land of engraved images, and they are mad over idols.

kikuyu: Ihindarĩrĩabũrũri ũcio ũgaakorwo ũkirĩte ihooru, nĩũkahurũka kũrĩa wagĩte kũhurũka hĩndĩ ya Thabatũ iria mwatũũrĩte kuo.
english: As long as it lies desolate it shall have rest, even the rest which it didn’t have in your Sabbaths when you lived on it.

kikuyu: Agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ, “Tũngĩhaanania ũthamaki wa Ngai na kĩ? Kana nĩ ngerekano ĩrĩkũ tũngĩheana ũhoro waguo nayo?
english: Immediately Jesus, perceiving in himself that the power had gone out from him, turned around in the crowd and asked, “Who touched my clothes?”

kikuyu: Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrĩ waigua ũhoro wa mũndũ ũhingũrĩtwo maitho aciarĩtwo arĩ mũtumumu.
english: Since the world began it has never been heard of that anyone opened the eyes of someone born blind.

kikuyu: Wee Ngai, thikĩrĩria ihooya rĩakwa, ndũkaage kũigua ithaithana rĩakwa;
english: Listen to my prayer, God. Don’t hide yourself from my supplication.

kikuyu: Kena mũno, wee Mwarĩ wa Zayuni! Anĩrĩra, wee Mwarĩ wa Jerusalemu! Atĩrĩrĩ, mũthamaki waku nĩarooka kũrĩ we, nĩ mũthingu na arĩ na ũhonokio, nĩ mũhooreri na akuuĩtwo nĩ ndigiri,
english: Rejoice greatly, daughter of Zion! Shout, daughter of Jerusalem! Behold, your King comes to you! He is righteous, and having salvation; lowly, and riding on a donkey, even on a colt, the foal of a donkey.

kikuyu: Aragania njĩra iria magũrũ maku marĩthiiagĩra, na ũthiiagĩre o njĩra iria ngiindĩrĩku.
english: Make the path of your feet level. Let all of your ways be established.

kikuyu: “Mwĩhaarĩriei tũrũe nake! Arahũkai, rekei tũmũtharĩkĩre mĩaraho! No rĩrĩ, wũi-ĩiya-ĩ! Nĩkũratuka, nacio ciĩruru cia hwaĩ-inĩ nĩiraraiha. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, arahũkai, tũtharĩkĩre kũrĩ ũtukũ, tũharaganie ciĩgitio ciake iria nũmu!”
english: “Prepare war against her! Arise! Let’s go up at noon. Woe to us! For the day declines, for the shadows of the evening are stretched out.

kikuyu: Acio nĩo ariũ a Rakeli arĩa maaciarĩirwo Jakubu othe maarĩ andũ ikũmi na ana.
english: These are the sons of Rachel, who were born to Jacob: all the souls were fourteen.

kikuyu: Mbere ya o mũirĩtu kũgĩa na mweke wa gũthiĩ kũrĩ Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu, aaniinaga mĩeri ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya gwĩthakaria ĩrĩa yaathanĩtwo ĩikaragwo nĩ airĩtu acio, ĩtandatũ ya kwĩhaka maguta ma manemane, na ĩtandatũ ya kwĩhaka maguta manungi wega na indo ingĩ cia kwĩhaka.
english: Each young woman’s turn came to go in to King Ahasuerus after her purification for twelve months (for so were the days of their purification accomplished, six months with oil of myrrh, and six months with sweet fragrances and with preparations for beautifying women).

kikuyu: O ta ũrĩa mũkoretwo mũkĩonwo ta mũrĩ arume mũrĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka ndũrĩrĩ, wee Juda na Isiraeli-rĩ, noguo ngaamũhonokia, na nĩmũgatuĩka kĩrathimo. Mũtigetigĩre, no gĩai na hinya.”
english: It shall come to pass that, as you were a curse among the nations, house of Judah and house of Israel, so I will save you, and you shall be a blessing. Don’t be afraid. Let your hands be strong.”

kikuyu: Mũtikaheenagĩrĩrio nĩ mĩthemba yothe ya morutani mageni. Nĩ wega ngoro ciitũ ciĩkĩragwo hinya nĩ Wega wa Ngai, na ti na ũndũ wa kũrĩa irio cia magongona iria itagunaga arĩa macirĩĩaga.
english: Exhort servants to be in subjection to their own masters and to be well-pleasing in all things, not contradicting,

kikuyu: Inyuĩ mũtindeheire ngʼondu cia maruta ma njino, kana mũkandĩĩithia na magongona manyu. Ndimũhatĩrĩirie na magongona ma mũtu, kana ngamũnogia na kũmwĩtia ũbumba.
english: You have not brought me any of your sheep for burnt offerings, neither have you honored me with your sacrifices. I have not burdened you with offerings, nor wearied you with frankincense.

kikuyu: “Mũrũ wa mũndũ, taarĩria ũhoro wa hekarũ ĩyo kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli, nĩguo maconoke nĩ ũndũ wa mehia mao. Reke maroranie mũcoro ũcio wayo,
english: In the thickness of the wall of the court toward the east, before the separate place, and before the building, there were rooms.

kikuyu: Thuutha wa ũguo, andũ a Juda magĩikũrũka makahũũrane na andũ a Kaanani arĩa maatũũraga bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Negevu na magũrũ-inĩ ma irĩma cia mwena wa ithũĩro. Ningĩ magĩthiĩ kũhũũrana na andũ a Kaanani arĩa maatũũraga kũu Hebironi (kũrĩa tene gwetagwo Kiriathu-Ariba) maathiĩ makĩhoota Sheshai, na Ahimani, na Talimai.
english: They buried him in the border of his inheritance in Timnath Heres, in the hill country of Ephraim, on the north of the mountain of Gaash.

kikuyu: Mũtikanareke ũndũ ũrĩa muonaga ũrĩ mwega ũtuĩke wa gũcambio.
english: (I also baptized the household of Stephanas; besides them, I don’t know whether I baptized any other.)

kikuyu: Musa na Eleazaru ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai makĩamũkĩra thahabu ĩyo kuuma kũrĩ anene a ikundi cia o ngiri, ngiri na anene a ikundi cia o igana, igana magĩcirehe Hema- inĩ ya Gũtũnganwo ituĩke kĩririkania harĩ andũ a Isiraeli mbere ya Jehova.
english: Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold of the captains of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the Tent of Meeting for a memorial for the children of Israel before Yahweh.

kikuyu: Nĩagĩĩkĩrire hinya harĩ Jakubu kĩrĩ kĩrĩra gĩake kĩa watho wa kũrũmagĩrĩrwo, agĩgĩĩkĩra hinya harĩ Isiraeli kĩrĩ kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa gũtũũra tene na tene:
english: and confirmed it to Jacob for a statute; to Israel for an everlasting covenant,

kikuyu: Ndũkanatunye arĩa athĩĩni indo ciao tondũ wa ũthĩĩni wao, na ndũkanahinyĩrĩrie arĩa abatari ciira-inĩ,
english: Don’t exploit the poor because he is poor; and don’t crush the needy in court;

kikuyu: (nĩgũkorwo mũndũ ũcio mũthingu, ũrĩa waikaranagia nao o mũthenya, nĩaiguithagio ruo ngoro-inĩ yake thingu nĩ ciĩko cia waganu iria oonaga na akaigua);
english: whom, not having known, you love. In him, though now you don’t see him, yet believing, you rejoice greatly with joy that is unspeakable and full of glory,

kikuyu: Jehova nĩathikagĩrĩria arĩa abatari, na ndangĩnyarara andũ ake moohetwo.
english: For Yahweh hears the needy, and doesn’t despise his captive people.

kikuyu: Mwaka-inĩ wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na mũgwanja, mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mbere, kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire, ngĩĩrwo atĩrĩ:
english: It came to pass in the twenty-seventh year, in the first month, in the first day of the month, Yahweh’s word came to me, saying,

kikuyu: Mũthingatanaga na niĩ o ta ũrĩa Mũrungu aathingataga nĩkĩ? Mũtirĩ mũraiganwo nĩ nyama ciakwa?
english: Why do you persecute me as God, and are not satisfied with my flesh?

kikuyu: “ ‘Rĩu-rĩ, gĩko gĩaku nĩ ũũra-thoni. Tondũ ngeretie gũgũtheria, no wee ndũngĩthera gĩko gĩaku, wee ndũngĩthera rĩngĩ nginya mangʼũrĩ makwa ma gũgũũkĩrĩra makahũahũa.
english: therefore the Lord Yahweh says, “I will stretch out my hand on Edom, and will cut off man and animal from it; and I will make it desolate from Teman. They will fall by the sword even to Dedan.

kikuyu: makĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene, makiuga atĩrĩ, “Jesũ, Mwathi witũ, tũiguĩre tha!”
english: They lifted up their voices, saying, “Jesus, Master, have mercy on us!”

kikuyu: O na gũtuĩka aathani maikaraga thĩ hamwe makanjambia, ndungata yaku nĩĩrĩcũũranagia kĩrĩra kĩa watho waku.
english: Though princes sit and slander me, your servant will meditate on your statutes.

kikuyu: Hiti ikaagambagĩra ciĩgitĩro-inĩ ciakuo, na mbwe ciikarage nyũmba iria njega cia ũthamaki. Na rĩrĩ, ihinda rĩa ituĩro rĩu nĩikinyu, na matukũ marĩo matikongererwo.
english: “I will rise up against them,” says Yahweh of Armies, “and cut off from Babylon name and remnant, and son and son’s son,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: Mbeũ iria ciagũire mũkĩra-inĩ wa njĩra nĩ andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro wa Ngai, nake mũcukani agooka akeheria ũhoro ũcio ngoro- inĩ ciao, nĩguo matigetĩkie mahonoke.
english: Those along the road are those who hear; then the devil comes and takes away the word from their heart, that they may not believe and be saved.

kikuyu: Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe, Ngai wa Isiraeli, ekwĩra andũ othe arĩa ndaarutire Jerusalemu ngĩmatwarithia Babuloni atĩrĩ:
english: Yahweh of Armies, the God of Israel, says to all the captives whom I have caused to be carried away captive from Jerusalem to Babylon:

kikuyu: agakua athiĩ kũrĩ maithe mao, acio matagacooka kuona ũtheri rĩngĩ.
english: “You give your mouth to evil. Your tongue frames deceit.

kikuyu: o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathanĩte. Nao maamũheire itũũra rĩrĩa oorĩtie aheo narĩo nĩ Timuna-Sera o kũu bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu. Nake agĩaka itũũra rĩu agĩtũũra kuo.
english: According to Yahweh’s commandment, they gave him the city which he asked, even Timnathserah in the hill country of Ephraim; and he built the city, and lived there.

kikuyu: Ahaana ta mũndũ waakaga nyũmba, ũrĩa wenjire mũthingi, akĩũrikia na akĩwamba igũrũ rĩa ihiga. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa kwagĩire mũiyũro wa maaĩ, kĩguũ gĩkĩgũtha nyũmba ĩyo na nditi, no gĩtiamĩenyenyirie, tondũ nĩyaakĩtwo wega. No mũndũ ũrĩa ũiguaga ciugo ciakwa, na ndekaga ũrĩa ciugĩte, ahaana ta mũndũ ũrĩa waakire nyũmba ĩtarĩ na mũthingi. Na rĩrĩa kĩguũ kĩagũthire nyũmba ĩyo, ĩkĩmomoka, naguo mwanangĩko wayo warĩ mũnene.”
english: He is like a man building a house, who dug and went deep and laid a foundation on the rock. When a flood arose, the stream broke against that house, and could not shake it, because it was founded on the rock.

kikuyu: Kũu mũingĩ-inĩ guothe andũ nĩmaragia na mĩheehũ ũhoro wake. Amwe makoiga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũcio nĩ mũndũ mwega.” Nao arĩa angĩ makoiga atĩrĩ, “Aca, mũndũ ũcio nĩaheenagia andũ.” No gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩaririe ũhoro wake akĩiguagwo nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra Ayahudi. Jesũ Kũrutana Gĩathĩ-inĩ
english: Again, therefore, Jesus spoke to them, saying, “I am the light of the world.* He who follows me will not walk in the darkness, but will have the light of life.”

kikuyu: Jehova nĩ mũthingu njĩra-inĩ ciake ciothe, na nĩendete kĩrĩa gĩothe ombĩte.
english: Yahweh is righteous in all his ways, and gracious in all his works.

kikuyu: “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, inyuĩ arĩithi-rĩ, iguai kiugo kĩa Jehova:
english: “ ‘Therefore, you shepherds, hear Yahweh’s word:

kikuyu: Ngai-rĩ, akĩrĩ o Ngai wa Ayahudi oiki? Githĩ Ngai ti wa andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ o nao? Ĩĩ, nĩ Ngai wa andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ o nao,
english: Or is God the God of Jews only? Isn’t he the God of Gentiles also? Yes, of Gentiles also,

kikuyu: Ndirĩ ũndũ ingĩhota gwĩka niĩ mwene; nduanagĩra ciira kũringana na ũrĩa njiguaga, na itua rĩakwa nĩ rĩa kĩhooto, nĩgũkorwo ndicaragia gwĩkenia niĩ mwene, tiga gũkenia ũrĩa wandũmire. Ũira Ũkoniĩ Jesũ
english: I can of myself do nothing. As I hear, I judge; and my judgment is righteous, because I don’t seek my own will, but the will of my Father who sent me.

kikuyu: na Rehumu, na Hashabina, na Maaseia,
english: Rehum, Hashabnah, Maaseiah,

kikuyu: Mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akĩũrĩra werũ-inĩ, handũ harĩa aathondekeirwo nĩ Ngai, harĩa aarĩ amenyererwo handũ ha ihinda rĩa matukũ 1,260. Na rĩrĩ, kũu igũrũ gũkĩgĩa mbaara. Mikaeli† na araika ake makĩrũa na ndamathia ĩyo, nayo ndamathia na araika ayo makĩrũa nao. No ndamathia ndĩarĩ na hinya wa kũigana, nayo hamwe na araika ayo makĩaga ũikaro kũu igũrũ.
english: The woman fled into the wilderness, where she has a place prepared by God, that there they may nourish her one thousand two hundred sixty days.

kikuyu: Athĩnjĩri-Ngai, na Alawii, na aikaria a ihingo, na aini na ndungata cia hekarũ, marĩ hamwe na andũ amwe ao, na andũ arĩa angĩ a Isiraeli magĩaka na magĩtũũra matũũra-inĩ mao.
english: So the priests, the Levites, the gatekeepers, the singers, some of the people, the temple servants, and all Israel lived in their cities. When the seventh month had come, the children of Israel were in their cities.

kikuyu: “Kũrathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũthamaki ũrĩa ũgũũka na rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani!”
english: saying, “Blessed is the King who comes in the name of the Lord!* Peace in heaven, and glory in the highest!”

kikuyu: “Anene othe a gathigathini, na andũ othe a Sidoni marĩ kũu; maaharũrũkirio hamwe na arĩa maanooragwo maconokete, o na kwarĩ na kũguoyohania kwarehetwo nĩ ũhoti wao. Makometio matarĩ aruu, marĩ hamwe na arĩa maanooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora, na maikaraga maconokete marĩ hamwe na arĩa maharũrũkagio irima.
english: “There are the princes of the north, all of them, and all the Sidonians, who have gone down with the slain. They are put to shame in the terror which they caused by their might. They lie uncircumcised with those who are slain by the sword, and bear their shame with those who go down to the pit.

kikuyu: Moimagarire nĩ ũndũ wa Rĩĩtwa rĩake na makĩrega ũteithio kuuma kũrĩ andũ arĩa matetĩkĩtie Ngai. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ithuĩ-rĩ, twagĩrĩirwo gũtaanahagĩra andũ ta acio nĩgeetha tũrutithanagie wĩra wa ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma tũrĩ hamwe.
english: Even as Sodom and Gomorrah and the cities around them, having in the same way as these given themselves over to sexual immorality and gone after strange flesh, are shown as an example, suffering the punishment of eternal fire.

kikuyu: Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩyo ĩĩrĩ, akiumagara agĩthiĩ Galili.
english: After the two days he went out from there and went into Galilee.

kikuyu: Atĩrĩ, andũ arĩa aaganu marekagwo matũũre muoyo nĩkĩ, magakũra o na magakĩrĩrĩria kũgĩa na ũhoti?
english: “Why do the wicked live, become old, yes, and grow mighty in power?

kikuyu: Atĩrĩrĩ, nĩngũtheretie o na gũtuĩka ti ta ũrĩa betha ĩtheragio; wee-rĩ, ngũgeretie thĩinĩ wa icua rĩa mĩnyamaro. Nĩ ũndũ wakwa niĩ mwene, ĩĩ ti-itherũ, nĩ ũndũ wakwa niĩ mwene-rĩ, nĩngeeka ũndũ ũcio. Niĩ mwene-rĩ, ndaahota atĩa gwĩtĩkĩria rĩĩtwa rĩakwa rĩthaahio? Riiri wakwa ndikaũhe mũndũ ũngĩ. Isiraeli Kũrekio
english: They shall not hunger nor thirst; neither shall the heat nor sun strike them, for he who has mercy on them will lead them. He will guide them by springs of water.

kikuyu: Nĩndirikanaga mawatho maku ma tene, Wee Jehova, namo nĩmahooreragia.
english: I remember your ordinances of old, Yahweh, and have comforted myself.

kikuyu: Athamaki aitũ, na atongoria aitũ, na athĩnjĩri- Ngai aitũ na maithe maitũ, matiarũmĩrĩire watho waku; matiathikĩrĩirie maathani maku kana mataaro marĩa wamaheire.
english: Also our kings, our princes, our priests, and our fathers have not kept your law, nor listened to your commandments and your testimonies with which you testified against them.

kikuyu: Kĩongo gĩa gĩcango kĩrĩa kĩarĩ hau gĩtugĩ-igũrũ, o kĩmwe kĩarĩ kĩa mĩkono ĩtano‡ kũraiha, na gĩkagemio na rũgara rũrĩ na makomamanga ma gĩcango gũthiũrũrũkĩria. Gĩtugĩ kĩu kĩngĩ gĩa keerĩ, kĩrĩ na makomamanga makĩo nĩkĩahaanaine biũ na kĩu kĩngĩ kĩa mbere. Na haarĩ na makomamanga mĩrongo kenda na matandatũ maacuuhĩte mĩena-inĩ; makomamanga mothe marĩa maathiũrũrũkĩirie igũrũ wa magemio macio ma rũgara maarĩ igana rĩmwe.
english: A capital of bronze was on it; and the height of the one capital was five cubits,‡ with network and pomegranates on the capital all around, all of bronze. The second pillar also had the same, with pomegranates.

kikuyu: iria Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babuloni ataakuuire hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aatahire Jekonia mũrũ wa Jehoiakimu mũthamaki wa Juda agĩthaamio arutĩtwo Jerusalemu na agĩtwarwo Babuloni, we mwene hamwe na andũ othe a Juda na a Jerusalemu arĩa maarĩ igweta: 21ĩĩ, ti-itherũ Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe, Ngai wa Isiraeli oigĩte atĩrĩ ũhoro ũkoniĩ indo icio itigaire thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Jehova, o na thĩinĩ wa gĩikaro kĩa mũthamaki wa Juda, o na kũu Jerusalemu:
english: There was also a man who prophesied in Yahweh’s name, Uriah the son of Shemaiah of Kiriath Jearim; and he prophesied against this city and against this land according to all the words of Jeremiah.

kikuyu: Ngoro yakwa ĩiyũrĩtwo nĩ ũhoro mwega rĩrĩa ngũinĩra mũthamaki rwĩmbo rũrũ; rũrĩmĩ rwakwa no ta karamu ka mwandĩki ũrĩa mũũgĩ.
english: My heart overflows with a noble theme. I recite my verses for the king. My tongue is like the pen of a skillful writer.

kikuyu: Njũũĩ nacio nĩikĩhũũre hĩ, o nacio irĩma nĩciine hamwe nĩ gũkena;
english: You answered them, Yahweh our God. You are a God who forgave them, although you took vengeance for their doings.

kikuyu: “Ningĩ irooto-inĩ ciakwa-rĩ, nĩndĩronire magira mũgwanja mega ma ngano na maiyũrĩte ngano, magĩkũũra kamũtĩ-inĩ ka ngano.
english: I saw in my dream, and behold, seven heads of grain came up on one stalk, full and good;

kikuyu: Rĩu tũkiuge atĩa? Nĩ atĩrĩ, ũndũ ũrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maatũire macaragia na kĩyo kĩnene matiawonire, no andũ arĩa athuure-rĩ, nĩmawonire. Acio angĩ nao nĩmoomirio ngoro,
english: What then? That which Israel seeks for, that he didn’t obtain, but the chosen ones obtained it, and the rest were hardened.

kikuyu: Njĩra cia gũthiĩ Zayuni no macakaya, nĩ ũndũ gũtirĩ andũ mookaga ciathĩ ciake iria njathane. Matoonyero make mothe makirĩte ihooru, athĩnjĩri-Ngai ake no gũcaaya maracaaya, airĩtu ake no kũgirĩka, nake arĩ na ruo rũnene.
english: He has bent his bow like an enemy. He has stood with his right hand as an adversary.  The word translated “Lord” is “Adonai.”

kikuyu: Moima Bene-Jaakani, magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao Horu-Hagidigadi.
english: They traveled from Bene Jaakan, and encamped in Hor Haggidgad.

kikuyu: Ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjara-inĩ kũrĩa gũtaarĩ na tĩĩri mũingĩ. Nacio ikĩmera o narua tondũ tĩĩri ndwarĩ mũriku. Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa riũa rĩarire, rĩgĩcina mĩmera ĩyo, nayo ĩkĩũma tondũ ndĩarĩ na mĩri. Na mbeũ ingĩ ikĩgũa mĩigua-inĩ, nayo mĩigua ĩgĩkũra, ĩgĩthararia mbeũ icio rĩrĩa ciamerire.
english: Others fell on rocky ground, where they didn’t have much soil, and immediately they sprang up, because they had no depth of earth.

kikuyu: Mũtwe wa mũhianano ũcio warĩ wa thahabu ĩrĩa therie, nakĩo gĩthũri kĩaguo na moko ciarĩ cia betha, nayo nda na ciero ciaguo ciarĩ cia gĩcango,
english: As for this image, its head was of fine gold, its chest and its arms of silver, its belly and its thighs of bronze,

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo rũrĩrĩ kana ũthamaki ũrĩa ũtagagũtungatĩra nĩũkaniinwo; ũkaanangwo biũ.
english: For that nation and kingdom that will not serve you shall perish; yes, those nations shall be utterly wasted.

kikuyu: “Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Tondũ Moabi na Seiru moigire atĩrĩ, “Ta rora, nyũmba ya Juda ĩtuĩkĩte o ta ndũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ ciothe,”
english: “ ‘The Lord Yahweh says: “Because Moab and Seir say, ‘Behold, the house of Judah is like all the nations,’

kikuyu: Anene acio othe nĩmookire kũrĩ Jeremia, makĩmũũria ũhoro ũcio, nake akĩmeera ũrĩa wothe aathĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki oige. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio matiamwĩrire ũndũ ũngĩ, nĩgũkorwo gũtirĩ mũndũ waiguĩte ũrĩa maarĩtie na mũthamaki. Nake Jeremia agĩikara kũu kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa arangĩri nginya mũthenya ũrĩa itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩatunyanirwo.
english: Then all the princes came to Jeremiah, and asked him; and he told them according to all these words that the king had commanded. So they stopped speaking with him, for the matter was not perceived.

kikuyu: Ũguo noguo ũgeekwo wee Betheli, nĩ ũndũ wa waganu waku mũnene. Rĩrĩa mũthenya ũcio ũgaakĩa-rĩ, mũthamaki wa Isiraeli nĩakaniinwo biũ.
english: So Bethel will do to you because of your great wickedness. At daybreak the king of Israel will be destroyed.

kikuyu: na mũthamaki wa Tapua, ũmwe, na mũthamaki wa Heferi, ũmwe,
english: the king of Tappuah, one; the king of Hepher, one;

kikuyu: bũrũri ũyũ Jehova aatooririe andũ akuo mbere ya andũ a Isiraeli, nĩ kũndũ kwega kwa mahiũ, na ithuĩ ndungata ciaku tũrĩ na mahiũ.”
english: the land which Yahweh struck before the congregation of Israel, is a land for livestock; and your servants have livestock.”

kikuyu: Nacio njiaro cia Nafitali kũringana na mbarĩ ciao ciarĩ ici: kuuma kũrĩ Jahazeeli, nĩ mbarĩ ya Ajahazeeli; kuuma kũrĩ Guni, nĩ mbarĩ ya Aguni;
english: The sons of Naphtali after their families: of Jahzeel, the family of the Jahzeelites; of Guni, the family of the Gunites;

kikuyu: Andũ marokũgooca, Wee Ngai; andũ othe marogũkumia.
english: But let the righteous be glad. Let them rejoice before God. Yes, let them rejoice with gladness.

kikuyu: Ũhoro wa watho wongereirwo nĩguo mehia mongerereke. No harĩa mehia mongererekire-rĩ, naguo wega wa Ngai ũkĩongerereka makĩria,
english: The law came in that the trespass might abound; but where sin abounded, grace abounded more exceedingly,

kikuyu: Ingĩruta nyama cia kũhe andũ aya othe kũ? Marandĩrĩra makiugaga atĩrĩ, ‘Tũhe nyama tũrĩe!’
english: Where could I get meat to give all these people? For they weep before me, saying, ‘Give us meat, that we may eat.’

kikuyu: Ũũ nĩguo tũmenyaga atĩ tũrĩ a ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma, na ũrĩa tũrĩigaga ngoro ciitũ itarĩ na nganja tũrĩ mbere yake,
english: And by this we know that we are of the truth and persuade our hearts before him,

kikuyu: Nĩmagagũũkĩrĩra marĩ na matharaita, na ngaari cia mbarathi cia ita, na makaari, na marĩ na kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ; nao mabange magũũkĩrĩre kuuma mĩena yothe, marĩ na ngo iria nene na iria nini, na mekĩrĩte ngũbia cia kĩgera
english: “Son of man, tell her, ‘You are a land that is not cleansed nor rained on in the day of indignation.’

kikuyu: ũrĩa ũtaamenyithirio andũ a njiarwa ingĩ, ta ũrĩa rĩu ũguũrĩirio atũmwo a Ngai atheru o na anabii nĩ Roho. Naguo mũbango wa Ngai nĩ atĩ, andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ nĩmatuĩkĩte agai hamwe na andũ a Isiraeli, na nĩmatuĩkĩte ciĩga cia mwĩrĩ ũmwe, na makagwatanĩra thĩinĩ wa kĩĩranĩro gĩa Kristũ Jesũ nĩ ũndũ wa kũhunjĩrio Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega.
english: which in other generations was not made known to the children of men, as it has now been revealed to his holy apostles and prophets in the Spirit,

kikuyu: Kũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mwĩhokeku ũrĩĩonanagia ũrĩ mwĩhokeku, na kũrĩ ũrĩa ũtarĩ ũcuuke ũrĩĩonanagia ndũrĩ ũcuuke,
english: With the merciful you will show yourself merciful. With the perfect man, you will show yourself perfect.

kikuyu: Andũ nĩmethondekagĩra ngai ciao ene? Ĩĩ, no rĩrĩ, icio ti ngai!”
english: Should a man make to himself gods which yet are no gods?”

kikuyu: Ciana cia Ana ciarĩ: Dishoni, na Oholibama mwarĩ wa Ana.
english: These are the children of Anah: Dishon and Oholibamah, the daughter of Anah.

kikuyu: Ngoro ya mwana yohanĩtio na ũrimũ, no rũthanju rwa kũmũherithia nĩrũkaũingata kũraya nake.
english: Folly is bound up in the heart of a child; the rod of discipline drives it far from him.

kikuyu: Njuĩrĩ yacio yahaanaga ta njuĩrĩ cia andũ-a-nja, namo magego maacio maatariĩ ta magego ma mũrũũthi.
english: Their dead bodies will be in the street of the great city, which spiritually is called  The word for “sorceries” (pharmakeia) also implies the use of potions, poisons, and drugs  TR reads “He” instead of “They”

kikuyu: Wee ũgaatuĩka wa kũmenwo, na wa kũnyararwo, na kĩndũ gĩa gũkaanania nakĩo, na kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi harĩ ndũrĩrĩ icio igũthiũrũrũkĩirie, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngaakũherithia ndĩ na marakara na mangʼũrĩ, na ngũkaanie na mathũgũta manene. Niĩ Jehova nĩ niĩ ndoiga ũguo. Rĩrĩa ngaakũratha na mĩguĩ yakwa ya ũragani na ya ngʼaragu, ngaakũratha ngũniine. Nĩngakũrehere ngʼaragu makĩria, na hinge njĩra ĩrĩa irio ciaku ciũkagĩra.
english: So it will be a reproach and a taunt, an instruction and an astonishment, to the nations that are around you, when I execute judgments on you in anger and in wrath, and in wrathful rebukes—I, Yahweh, have spoken it—

kikuyu: Mũhianĩre wacio nĩ ta wa mbarathi cia ita; ihanyũkaga ta thigari ihaicĩte mbarathi.
english: Peter, fastening his eyes on him, with John, said, “Look at us.”

kikuyu: Ta ũrĩa indo cia rĩũmba inyorokagio ikahenia na igũrũ, no taguo mĩromo mĩnyoroku ĩhumbagĩra ngoro ĩrĩ na ũũru.
english: Like silver dross on an earthen vessel are the lips of a fervent one with an evil heart.

kikuyu: nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngamũtambũrũkĩria guoko gwakwa, ndĩmũũkĩrĩre na ndĩmũneane mũtahwo nĩ ndũrĩrĩ. Nĩngamweherania na ndũrĩrĩ, na ndĩmũniine mabũrũri-inĩ. Nĩngamwananga, na inyuĩ nĩmũkamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova.’ ” Ũrathi wa Gũũkĩrĩra Moabi
english: therefore, behold, I have stretched out my hand on you, and will deliver you for a plunder to the nations. I will cut you off from the peoples, and I will cause you to perish out of the countries. I will destroy you. Then you will know that I am Yahweh.”

kikuyu: Gĩkuũ na Mwanangĩko ciikaraga ciĩyanĩkĩte mbere ya Jehova, ĩ nacio ngoro cia andũ-rĩ, ikĩĩanĩkĩte atĩa!
english: Honest balances and scales are Yahweh’s; all the weights in the bag are his work.

kikuyu: Geithiai Rufusi, ũrĩa mũthuure thĩinĩ wa Mwathani, o na mũgeithie nyina, ũrĩa ũkoretwo arĩ o ta maitũ. Ningĩ mũgeithie Asunikirito, na Felegoni, na Herime, na Pateroba, na Herima, o na ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ arĩa marĩ hamwe nao.
english: Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that you may abound in hope in the power of the Holy Spirit.

kikuyu: Nĩngacirathima na ndaathime kũrĩa gũthiũrũkĩirie kĩrĩma gĩakwa. Nĩngoiragia mbura hĩndĩ ya kĩmera yakinya; nĩgũkaagĩa mbura ya kĩrathimo.
english: I will make them and the places around my hill a blessing. I will cause the shower to come down in its season. There will be showers of blessing.

kikuyu: Rongoriai Jehova, mũtũũre muoyo, ndakae gũtuthũkĩra nyũmba ya Jusufu ta mwaki; naguo mwaki ũcio nĩũkaniinana,
english: Seek Yahweh, and you will live, lest he break out like fire in the house of Joseph, and it devour, and there be no one to quench it in Bethel.

kikuyu: Thahabu kana icicio-rĩ, itingĩhota kũgerekanio naguo; o na kana ũkũũranio na mathaga ma thahabu.
english: Gold and glass can’t equal it, neither will it be exchanged for jewels of fine gold.

kikuyu: “ ‘Rĩrĩa mũndũ-wa-nja angiura thakame ategũtigithĩria mĩthenya mĩingĩ ihinda rĩtarĩ rĩake rĩa mweri, kana kuura kũngĩ gũkĩrĩte ihinda rĩake rĩa mweri, nĩagaikara arĩ na thaahu rĩrĩa rĩothe ekuura ũguo, o ta ũrĩa akoragwo arĩ na thaahu ihinda-inĩ rĩake rĩa mweri.
english: “ ‘If a woman has a discharge of her blood many days not in the time of her period, or if she has a discharge beyond the time of her period, all the days of the discharge of her uncleanness shall be as in the days of her period. She is unclean.

kikuyu: Nĩtũũĩ atĩ nginyagia rĩu ciũmbe icio ciothe itũire icaayaga irĩ na ruo ta rwa mũndũ-wa-nja akĩheo mwana. Na to indo icio icaayaga, no o na ithuĩ arĩa tũrĩ na maciaro ma mbere ma Roho, nĩtũcaayaga ngoro-inĩ ciitũ thĩinĩ, twetereire hĩndĩ ĩkinye ya gũtuuo ciana cia Ngai, na nĩkuo gũkũũrwo kwa mĩĩrĩ iitũ kuuma ũkombo-inĩ.
english: What if God, willing to show his wrath and to make his power known, endured with much patience vessels of wrath prepared for destruction,

kikuyu: Acio nĩwe marĩathĩkagĩra na marutage wĩra wothe wa Hema ĩyo, no matikanakuhĩrĩrie indo cia handũ hau haamũre kana kĩgongona, kana wee hamwe nao mũkue.
english: For the time will come when they will not listen to the sound doctrine, but having itching ears, will heap up for themselves teachers after their own lusts,

kikuyu: ngiumagara ũtukũ ndĩ na andũ matarĩ aingĩ. Ndierĩte mũndũ o na ũmwe ũndũ ũrĩa Ngai wakwa eekĩrĩte ngoro-inĩ yakwa njĩke nĩ ũndũ wa Jerusalemu. Gũtiarĩ na mbarathi ingĩ tiga ĩrĩa yanguuĩte.
english: I arose in the night, I and a few men with me. I didn’t tell anyone what my God put into my heart to do for Jerusalem. There wasn’t any animal with me except the animal that I rode on.

kikuyu: Bũrũri wao warĩ na matũũra maya: Helikathu, na Hali, na Beteni, na Akishafu,
english: Their border was Helkath, Hali, Beten, Achshaph,

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo ũiru nĩguo warahũraga mangʼũrĩ ma mũthuuri, na ndakaigua tha akĩĩrĩhĩria.
english: For jealousy arouses the fury of the husband. He won’t spare in the day of vengeance.

kikuyu: Nĩmamũrutire nguo, makĩmũtunya ariũ na aarĩ ake, na makĩmũũraga na rũhiũ rwa njora. Nĩatuĩkire wa kuunagwo thimo gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ-a-nja, nake nĩ aaherithirio.
english: In you have they uncovered their fathers’ nakedness. In you have they humbled her who was unclean in her impurity.

kikuyu: Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire nĩacookia wega, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Wee-rĩ, ndũrĩ haraaya na ũthamaki wa Ngai.” Na kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo gũtirĩ mũndũ wacookire kũũmĩrĩria kũmũũria ciũria ingĩ. Kristũ nĩ Mũriũ Wa ũ? Na rĩrĩ, Jesũ akĩrutana nja-inĩ cia hekarũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga arutani a watho moige atĩ Kristũ nĩ mũrũ wa Daudi?
english: When Jesus saw that he answered wisely, he said to him, “You are not far from God’s Kingdom.” No one dared ask him any question after that.

kikuyu: Ndũkandaihĩrĩrie, nĩgũkorwo thĩĩna ũrĩ o hakuhĩ, na gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa kũndeithia.
english: Don’t be far from me, for trouble is near. For there is no one to help.

kikuyu: Abimeleku na ikundi iria aarĩ nacio makĩguthũka mbere nginya hau itoonyero-inĩ rĩa kĩhingo gĩa itũũra inene, nacio ikundi icio ingĩ igĩrĩ ikĩguthũkĩra arĩa maarĩ mĩgũnda-inĩ, ikĩmooraga.
english: Abimelech and the companies that were with him rushed forward and stood in the entrance of the gate of the city; and the two companies rushed on all who were in the field and struck them.

kikuyu: Athĩĩni marĩkoragwo na inyuĩ hĩndĩ ciothe na no mũmateithie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe mũngĩenda. No niĩ mũtirĩkoragwo na niĩ hĩndĩ ciothe.
english: There was one called Barabbas, bound with his fellow insurgents, men who in the insurrection had committed murder.

kikuyu: “O ta ũrĩa Baba anyendete, ũguo noguo na niĩ ndĩmwendete. Rĩu-rĩ, ikaragai o wendo-inĩ wakwa.
english: Even as the Father has loved me, I also have loved you. Remain in my love.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo gũtũ gũthuuranagia ciugo o ta ũrĩa rũrĩmĩ rũcamaga irio.
english: For the ear tries words, as the palate tastes food.

kikuyu: Thũ ciakwa ciothe iheehanagĩra nĩguo iinjũkĩrĩre; injiiragĩrĩra maũndũ mooru mũno, ikoiga atĩrĩ,
english: Deep calls to deep at the noise of your waterfalls. All your waves and your billows have swept over me.

kikuyu: Ĩtanarĩkia kũhooya-rĩ, Rebeka agĩũka akuuĩte ndigithũ kĩande-inĩ. Aarĩ mũirĩtu wa Bethueli mũrũ wa Milika, ũrĩa warĩ mũtumia wa Nahoru mũrũ wa nyina na Iburahĩmu.
english: Before he had finished speaking, behold, Rebekah came out, who was born to Bethuel the son of Milcah, the wife of Nahor, Abraham’s brother, with her pitcher on her shoulder.

kikuyu: Akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũũ nĩguo kwandĩkĩtwo: Kristũ nĩakanyariirwo na ariũkio kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ mũthenya wa gatatũ,
english: He said to them, “Thus it is written, and thus it was necessary for the Christ to suffer and to rise from the dead the third day,

kikuyu: Mĩbango nĩĩthaataga nĩ kwaga kĩrĩra, no kũrĩ na ataarani aingĩ mĩbango nĩĩgaacagĩra.
english: Where there is no counsel, plans fail; but in a multitude of counselors they are established.

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo nĩmaremeire ciugo cia Mũrungu, o na makĩagĩra kĩrĩra kĩa Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno bata. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmarutithia wĩra wa hinya; nao makĩhĩngwo na gũkĩaga wa kũmateithia.
english: because they rebelled against the words of God,‡ and condemned the counsel of the Most High.

kikuyu: Nĩngatũma mathũũrwo mũno, matuĩke kĩndũ gĩa gũthirĩkia mothamaki mothe ma gũkũ thĩ, na mameneke na matuĩke a kuunagwo thimo, na matũũre mathekagĩrĩrwo na manyiitagwo nĩ kĩrumi kũrĩa guothe ngaamathaamĩria.
english: Concerning the prophets: My heart within me is broken. All my bones shake. I am like a drunken man, and like a man whom wine has overcome, because of Yahweh, and because of his holy words.

kikuyu: Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: Rĩrĩa inyuĩ mwekaga maũndũ macio mothe, niĩ nĩndamwaragĩria kaingĩ kaingĩ, no mũtiigana kũnjigua; ndamwĩtire no mũtiigana kũnjĩtĩka. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, ũrĩa ndeekire kũu Shilo noguo ngeeka nyũmba ĩno ĩĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa rĩakwa, o hekarũ ĩno mwĩhokete, kũndũ gũkũ ndamũheire inyuĩ o na ngĩhe maithe manyu.
english: “ ‘I will utterly consume them, says Yahweh. No grapes will be on the vine, no figs on the fig tree, and the leaf will fade. The things that I have given them will pass away from them.’ ”

kikuyu: Mũtikanarĩe mũgate o na ũrĩkũ, kana ngano ya kũhĩĩhio, kana ya mũgethano, o nginya mũthenya ũrĩa mũkaarehera Ngai wanyu iruta rĩĩrĩ. Ũndũ ũyũ ũtuĩke watho mwandĩke wa gũtũũra nginya kũrĩ njiarwa iria igooka, kũrĩa guothe mũgaatũũra. Gĩathĩ kĩa Magetha
english: You must not eat bread, or roasted grain, or fresh grain, until this same day, until you have brought the offering of your God. This is a statute forever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

kikuyu: Kanua ka mũtumia mũtharia nĩ irima iriku, nake ũrĩa werekeirio mangʼũrĩ ma Jehova agũũaga thĩinĩ wa rĩo.
english: The mouth of an adulteress is a deep pit. He who is under Yahweh’s wrath will fall into it.

kikuyu: na ũrĩa ũngĩenda gũtuĩka wa mbere thĩinĩ wanyu nĩatuĩke ngombo yanyu,
english: Whoever desires to be first among you shall be your bondservant,

kikuyu: Ti-itherũ nĩngamacookanĩrĩria kuuma mabũrũri-inĩ marĩa ndaamathaamĩirie ndĩ na marakara mahiũ na mangʼũrĩ maingĩ; ngaamacookia kũndũ gũkũ na ndũme matũũre marĩ agitĩre.
english: Yahweh says: “If heaven above can be measured, and the foundations of the earth searched out beneath, then I will also cast off all the offspring of Israel for all that they have done,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: Kũndũ kũrĩa guothe mũtũũraga, matũũra macio nĩmakanangwo, na kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru kũmomorwo, nĩguo igongona cianyu ithũkio na cianangwo, nayo mĩhianano yanyu ĩhehenjwo na yũnũhwo, o na igongona cianyu cia gũcinĩrwo ũbumba imomorwo, na kĩrĩa mũthondekete kĩniinwo.
english: In all your dwelling places, the cities will be laid waste and the high places will be desolate, so that your altars may be laid waste and made desolate, and your idols may be broken and cease, and your incense altars may be cut down, and your works may be abolished.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo Ngai ndatĩĩagĩra andũ maũthĩ.
english: For there is no partiality with God.

kikuyu: Angĩkorwo honge imwe cia mũtamaiyũ wa mũgũnda nĩciakahũrirwo, nawe, o na watuĩka ũrĩ rũhonge rwa mũtamaiyũ wa gĩthaka-rĩ, ũgĩciarithanio na honge icio ingĩ, na rĩu nĩũgayanaga ũnoru na icio ingĩ kuuma mũri wa mũtamaiyũ ũcio-rĩ,
english: But if some of the branches were broken off, and you, being a wild olive, were grafted in among them and became partaker with them of the root and of the richness of the olive tree,

kikuyu: Tiganĩriai matũũra manyu mũgatũũre ndwaro-inĩ cia mahiga, inyuĩ arĩa mũtũũraga Moabi. Tuĩkai ta ndutura ĩrĩa ĩyakagĩra gĩtara mũromo-inĩ wa ngurunga.
english: You inhabitants of Moab, leave the cities, and dwell in the rock. Be like the dove that makes her nest over the mouth of the abyss.

kikuyu: Nĩngacirehera arĩithi a gũcirĩithagia, na itigacooka gwĩtigĩra kana kũmaka, na gũtirĩ o na ĩmwe yacio ĩkoora,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: I will set up shepherds over them who will feed them. They will no longer be afraid or dismayed, neither will any be lacking,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: Nacio ikundi cia kambĩ ya Rubeni ikĩrũmĩrĩra ikundi cia Juda, irũmĩrĩire bendera yao. Elizuru mũrũ wa Shedeuru nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wao.
english: At the commandment of Yahweh, the children of Israel traveled, and at the commandment of Yahweh they encamped. As long as the cloud remained on the tabernacle they remained encamped.

kikuyu: “ ‘Itua rĩu rĩanĩrĩirwo nĩ arangĩri, narĩo rĩgekĩrwo hinya nĩ arĩa atheru, nĩgeetha arĩa marĩ muoyo mamenye atĩ Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno nĩwe wathaga mothamaki ma andũ, naguo ũthamaki aũheaga o ũrĩa angĩenda kũũhe, na agatũũgĩria mũndũ ũtarĩ igweta o na hanini nĩguo ũtuĩke wake.’
english: “ ‘The sentence is by the decree of the watchers and the demand by the word of the holy ones, to the intent that the living may know that the Most High rules in the kingdom of men, and gives it to whomever he will, and sets up over it the lowest of men.’

kikuyu: Mwarĩ wa mbere aamũtuire Jemima, na wa keerĩ aamũtuire Kezia, nake wa gatatũ akĩmũtua Kereni-Hapuku.
english: He called the name of the first, Jemimah; and the name of the second, Keziah; and the name of the third, Keren Happuch.

kikuyu: Nĩngamwĩkĩra Roho wakwa, na inyuĩ nĩmũgatũũra muoyo, na nĩngamũtwara bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ wanyu kĩũmbe mũgatũũre kuo. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmũkamenya atĩ niĩ Jehova nĩ niĩ njarĩtie, na nĩ niĩ njĩkĩte ũguo, ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.’ ” Rũrĩrĩ Rũmwe Rungu rwa Mũthamaki Ũmwe
english: “Therefore, son of man, prophesy, and tell Gog, ‘The Lord Yahweh says: “In that day when my people Israel dwells securely, will you not know it?

kikuyu: Hihi nĩmaconokaga nĩ mũtugo ũcio wao ũrĩ magigi? Aca, maticonokaga o na hanini; o na matirĩ rũkobe. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio o nao makaagũanĩra na arĩa makaagũa; nĩmakarũndwo rĩrĩa ngaamaherithia,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: Were they ashamed when they had committed abomination? No, they were not at all ashamed, neither could they blush. Therefore they will fall among those who fall. When I visit them, they will be cast down,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: nĩguo njĩra ciaku imenyeke gũkũ thĩ, ũhonokio waku ũmenywo nĩ ndũrĩrĩ ciothe.
english: As smoke is driven away, so drive them away. As wax melts before the fire, so let the wicked perish at the presence of God.

kikuyu: Ithiithi ciao nĩcio ciumbũraga ũrĩa mahaana; maanĩkaga mehia mao o ta ma Sodomu; o na matimahithaga. Kaĩ marĩ na haaro-ĩ!
english: The look of their faces testify against them. They parade their sin like Sodom. They don’t hide it. Woe to their soul! For they have brought disaster upon themselves.

kikuyu: Ũhoro wa kũrigĩrĩria ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, gĩagai na hinya thĩinĩ wa Mwathani mũkĩhotithagio nĩ ũhoti wake mũnene.
english: Finally, be strong in the Lord and in the strength of his might.

kikuyu: O na inyuĩ mũngĩgwatia bũrũri ũcio thaahu, nĩũkamũtahĩka o ta ũrĩa watahĩkire arĩa maatũũraga kuo mbere yanyu.
english: that the land not vomit you out also, when you defile it, as it vomited out the nation that was before you.

kikuyu: Na maarĩkia kũringa mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ, magĩkinya Genesareti, makĩoha gatarũ kao hũgũrũrũ- inĩ cia iria.
english: When they had crossed over, they came to land at Gennesaret and moored to the shore.

kikuyu: Tondũ wa marakara ma Jehova, bũrũri ũcio ndũgacooka gũtũũrwo nĩ andũ, no rĩrĩ, nĩgũkira gũgaakira ihooru biũ. Andũ arĩa othe makaagerera kũu Babuloni nĩmakamaka, na manyũrũrie kũndũ kũu tondũ wa ũrĩa gũgaakorwo kwanangĩtwo.
english: Because of Yahweh’s wrath she won’t be inhabited, but she will be wholly desolate. Everyone who goes by Babylon will be astonished, and hiss at all her plagues.

kikuyu: Maya nĩmo maandĩko ma Hezekia mũthamaki wa Juda marĩa aandĩkire thuutha wa kũrũara na kũhona:
english: The writing of Hezekiah king of Judah, when he had been sick, and had recovered of his sickness:

kikuyu: Nĩgeetha kĩrĩndĩ kĩũngane-rĩ, huhagai tũrumbeta, no ti na mĩhuhĩre ta ĩyo ĩngĩ.
english: But when the assembly is to be gathered together, you shall blow, but you shall not sound an alarm.

kikuyu: Mahinda maingĩ nĩmageririe Mũrungu; maathirĩkirie Ũrĩa-Mũtheru-wa-Isiraeli.
english: They turned again and tempted God, and provoked the Holy One of Israel.

kikuyu: O na ciana ciao nĩiririkanaga igongona ciao na itugĩ cia Ashera iria ciahaandĩtwo rungu rwa mĩtĩ ĩrĩa mĩruru, o na tũrĩma-inĩ tũrĩa tũraihu na igũrũ.
english: Even their children remember their altars and their Asherah poles by the green trees on the high hills.

kikuyu: “Nũũ ũyũ wĩyambararĩtie ta Rũũĩ rwa Nili, akaambarara ta njũũĩ irĩ na ndiihũ cia maaĩ?
english: “How can you be quiet, since Yahweh has given you a command? Against Ashkelon, and against the seashore, there he has appointed it.”

kikuyu: Mũtuanĩri ciira arĩ ho, harĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũndegaga na akaaga gwĩtĩkĩra ciugo ciakwa; kiugo kĩu ndaaririe nĩkĩo gĩkaamũtuĩra ciira mũthenya wa mũthia.
english: He who rejects me, and doesn’t receive my sayings, has one who judges him. The word that I spoke will judge him in the last day.

kikuyu: “Gũtirĩmũtĩmwegaũciaragamaciaromooru, kanamũtĩmũũruũgaciaramaciaromega.
english: “For there is no good tree that produces rotten fruit, nor again a rotten tree that produces good fruit.

kikuyu: Ithuĩ tũherithĩtio na kĩhooto, nĩgũkorwo tũraherithĩrio ũrĩa twĩkĩte. No rĩrĩ, mũndũ ũyũ ndarĩ ũndũ mũũru ekĩte.”
english: And we indeed justly, for we receive the due reward for our deeds, but this man has done nothing wrong.”

kikuyu: Nĩmariganĩirwo nĩ niĩ o ta mũndũ ũkuĩte; ngakĩhaana o ta nyũngũ nguũ.
english: Blessed is the nation whose God is Yahweh, the people whom he has chosen for his own inheritance.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo Afarisai makiuma nja, magĩthugunda ũrĩa mangĩmũtega na ciugo ciake.
english: Then the Pharisees went and took counsel how they might entrap him in his talk.

kikuyu: no rĩrĩa twakaĩire Jehova-rĩ, nĩaiguire kĩrĩro giitũ nake agĩtũma mũraika agĩtũruta kũu bũrũri wa Misiri. “Na rĩu tũrĩ gũkũ Kadeshi, itũũra rĩrĩa rĩ mũthia-inĩ wa bũrũri waku.
english: “Whoever in the open field touches one who is slain with a sword, or a dead body, or a bone of a man, or a grave, shall be unclean seven days.

kikuyu: Mũtikanakuue mũrigo mũũrute nyũmba-inĩ cianyu, kana mũrute wĩra o na ũrĩkũ mũthenya wa Thabatũ, no rĩrĩ, mũthenya wa Thabatũ mũwamũrage, o ta ũrĩa ndaathire maithe manyu mekage. No matiigana gũthikĩrĩria kana kũrũmbũiya ũhoro ũcio: moomirie ngingo, makĩaga gũthikĩrĩria, o na makĩrega gũtaarwo.
english: Don’t carry a burden out of your houses on the Sabbath day. Don’t do any work, but make the Sabbath day holy, as I commanded your fathers.

kikuyu: Ithuĩ twatariĩ ta twarĩ nda, twenyogondaga nĩ ruo, no rĩrĩ, nĩ ta twaciarire o rũhuho. Gũtirĩ ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wa kũhonokania twĩkĩte gũkũ thĩ, o na kana tũgaciara andũ arĩa maikaraga gũkũ thĩ. No rĩrĩ, andũ aku arĩa makuĩte nĩmagatũũra muoyo; mĩĩrĩ yao nĩĩkariũka. Inyuĩ arĩa mũtũũraga rũkũngũ-inĩ, ũkĩrai na mwanĩrĩre nĩ gũkena. Ime rĩanyu rĩtariĩ ta ireera rĩa rũciinĩ; nayo thĩ nĩĩgacookia andũ arĩa akuũ muoyo.
english: We have been with child. We have been in pain. We gave birth, it seems, only to wind. We have not worked any deliverance in the earth; neither have the inhabitants of the world fallen.

kikuyu: “Ũndũ ũyũ ũgũtuĩka watho mwandĩke wa kũrũmagĩrĩrwo hĩndĩ ciothe nĩ inyuĩ; horohio ĩrĩrutagwo riita rĩmwe o mwaka nĩ ũndũ wa mehia mothe ma andũ a Isiraeli.” Na gũgĩĩkwo o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathĩte Musa gwĩkagwo.
english: “This shall be an everlasting statute for you, to make atonement for the children of Israel once in the year because of all their sins.” It was done as Yahweh commanded Moses.

kikuyu: Nĩngũinĩra Jehova, nĩgũkorwo nĩanjĩkĩte wega mũno.
english: You frustrate the plan of the poor, because Yahweh is his refuge.

kikuyu: Nayo thĩ ĩgĩathamia kanua kayo ĩkĩmameria hamwe na Kora, ũrĩa arũmĩrĩri ake maakuire rĩrĩa mwaki wacinire arũme arĩa 250. Nao magĩtuĩka kĩonereria gĩa gũkaania arĩa angĩ. No rĩrĩ, rũciaro rwa Kora rũtiathirire.
english: and the earth opened its mouth, and swallowed them up together with Korah when that company died; at the time the fire devoured two hundred fifty men, and they became a sign.

kikuyu: Jehova Mwene- Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: “Nĩnjiguaga ũiru mũno nĩ ũndũ wa Zayuni; nĩndĩracinwo nĩ ũiru nĩ ũndũ wake.”
english: Yahweh of Armies says: “I am jealous for Zion with great jealousy, and I am jealous for her with great wrath.”

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũmwe nĩakoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Niĩ ndĩ wa Jehova’; nake ũrĩa ũngĩ akeĩtania na Jakubu; o nake ũngĩ eyandĩke guoko gwake atĩrĩ, ‘Ndĩ wa Jehova,’ na eetue rĩĩtwa rĩĩtanĩtio na Isiraeli. Nĩ Jehova, ti Mĩhianano
english: One will say, ‘I am Yahweh’s.’ Another will be called by the name of Jacob; and another will write with his hand ‘to Yahweh,’ and honor the name of Israel.”

kikuyu: na maikie arĩa aaganu icua-inĩ rĩa mwaki, kũrĩa gũgaakorwo na kĩrĩro na kũhagarania magego.”
english: and will cast them into the furnace of fire. There will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.”

kikuyu: na moime kuo, arĩa mekĩte wega mariũke nĩguo matũũre muoyo, nao arĩa mekĩte ũũru mariũke nĩguo matuĩrwo ciira.
english: and will come out; those who have done good, to the resurrection of life; and those who have done evil, to the resurrection of judgment.

kikuyu: Nĩmakahũgũra matũ mao matige kũigua ũhoro wa ma, na magarũrũkĩre ngʼano cia tũhũ. No wee- rĩ, ikaraga wĩiguĩte maũndũ-inĩ mothe, na ũmĩrĩrie kũnyariirwo, ningĩ rutaga wĩra wa kũhunjia ũhoro wa Ngai, na ũhingagie mawĩra mothe ma ũtungata waku.
english: he is conceited, knowing nothing, but obsessed with arguments, disputes, and word battles, from which come envy, strife, insulting, evil suspicions,

kikuyu: Norĩrĩ, andũnĩmehumbenguociamakũniaonacionyamũnĩihumbwo makũnia. O mũndũ nĩakaĩre Ngai narua. Andũ nĩmatige mĩthiĩre yao mĩũru na ngũĩ ciao.
english: When the sun arose, God prepared a sultry east wind; and the sun beat on Jonah’s head, so that he was faint and requested for himself that he might die. He said, “It is better for me to die than to live.”

kikuyu: “Wee Jehova, ta rora, na ũcũũranie: Nũũ ũngĩ wee ũrĩ weka ũguo? Andũ-a-nja nĩmagĩrĩirwo nĩ kũrĩa maciaro mao, o ciana iria marerete? Mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai na mũnabii nĩmagĩrĩire kũũragagĩrwo handũ-harĩa-haamũre ha Mwathani?
english: “Look, Yahweh, and see to whom you have done thus! Should the women eat their offspring, the children that they held and bounced on their knees? Should the priest and the prophet be killed in the sanctuary of the Lord?

kikuyu: Hamani Gũcuurio Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki na Hamani magĩthiĩ kũrĩanĩra na Esiteri, mũtumia wa mũthamaki,
english: The king arose in his wrath from the banquet of wine and went into the palace garden. Haman stood up to make request for his life to Esther the queen, for he saw that there was evil determined against him by the king.

kikuyu: Kĩguũ nĩgĩgathereria nyũmba yake, indo cia nyũmba yake ithererio nĩ kĩguũ mũthenya ũcio wa mangʼũrĩ ma Ngai.
english: The increase of his house will depart. They will rush away in the day of his wrath.

kikuyu: Nũũ ũngĩ ndĩ nake kũu igũrũ tiga Wee? Gũkũ thĩ ndirĩ na kĩndũ ĩngĩĩrirĩria tiga o Wee.
english: Whom do I have in heaven? There is no one on earth whom I desire besides you.

kikuyu: Mamũrathagĩra ũhoro wa maheeni, makĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩakwa. Ti niĩ ndĩmatũmĩte,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: As for the prophet who prophesies of peace, when the word of the prophet happens, then the prophet will be known, that Yahweh has truly sent him.”

kikuyu: Mwĩtũũgĩrio wa mũndũ nĩũkaharũrũkio, na mwĩtĩĩo wa andũ ũconorithio; no Jehova we wiki nĩwe ũgaatũũgĩrio mũthenya ũcio,
english: The loftiness of man shall be bowed down, and the arrogance of men shall be brought low; and Yahweh alone shall be exalted in that day.

kikuyu: “Arĩria andũ a Isiraeli, ũmeere atĩrĩ: ‘Ici nĩcio ciathĩ ciakwa iria ciathanĩtwo, o iria ciathanĩtwo cia Jehova, iria mũkaahunjanĩria ũhoro wacio atĩ nĩ ciũngano theru. Thabatũ
english: “Speak to the children of Israel, and tell them, ‘The set feasts of Yahweh, which you shall proclaim to be holy convocations, even these are my set feasts.

kikuyu: Arahũka, Wee Jehova! Wee Ngai wakwa, honokia! Thũ ciakwa ciothe nĩwe ũcigũthĩte thĩa, na ũkoinanga magego ma andũ arĩa aaganu.
english: Then he came, and he took it out of the right hand of him who sat on the throne.

kikuyu: Kuuma harĩ iruta rĩa ũiguano rĩa andũ a Isiraeli, nĩnjoete gĩthũri kĩrĩa gĩthũngũthĩtio, na kĩero kĩrĩa kĩneanĩtwo kũrĩ niĩ, ngacihe Harũni ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai na kũrĩ ariũ ake ituĩke rwĩga rwao rwa hĩndĩ ciothe kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli.’ ”
english: For the waved breast and the heaved thigh I have taken from the children of Israel out of the sacrifices of their peace offerings, and have given them to Aaron the priest and to his sons as their portion forever from the children of Israel.’ ”

kikuyu: Ituĩro rĩakwa rĩa kĩhooto nĩrĩkiume kũrĩ wee; maitho maku nĩmakĩone o ũndũ ũrĩa wagĩrĩire.
english: Yahweh is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my rock, in whom I take refuge; my shield, and the horn of my salvation, my high tower.  Sheol is the place of the dead.

kikuyu: “ ‘Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ, andũ aya a Juda nĩmekĩte maũndũ mooru maitho-inĩ makwa. Nĩmaigĩte mĩhianano ĩyo yao ĩrĩ magigi kũu thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ĩyo ĩĩtanĩtio na Rĩĩtwa rĩakwa, makamĩthaahia.
english: “For the children of Judah have done that which is evil in my sight,” says Yahweh. “They have set their abominations in the house which is called by my name, to defile it.

kikuyu: Nacio ciarĩ na ngo cia kũgitĩra gĩthũri ciahaanaga ta ngo cia kĩgera, naguo mũgambo wa mathagu maacio warĩ ta mũrurumo wa mbarathi nyingĩ na ngaari cia ita itengʼerete irorete mbaara-inĩ
english: I went to the angel, telling him to give me the little book. He said to me, “Take it and eat it. It will make your stomach bitter, but in your mouth it will be as sweet as honey.”

kikuyu: nĩ ũndũ ũcio, Mwathani Jehova oigĩte atĩrĩ, ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa niĩ ndũũraga muoyo-rĩ, nĩngakũneana ũitwo thakame, nayo nĩĩgathingatana nawe. Kuona atĩ ndwamenire ũiti wa thakame-rĩ, ũiti wa thakame nĩũgaathingatana nawe.
english: therefore, as I live,” says the Lord Yahweh, “I will prepare you for blood, and blood will pursue you. Since you have not hated blood, therefore blood will pursue you.

kikuyu: Acio nĩo ariũ arĩa maaciarĩirwo Jakubu nĩ Biliha ũrĩa Labani aaheete mwarĩ Rakeli, othe maarĩ mũgwanja.
english: These are the sons of Bilhah, whom Laban gave to Rachel, his daughter, and these she bore to Jacob: all the souls were seven.

kikuyu: Anga mũtirĩ mwamenya? Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwaigua ũhoro? Jehova nĩwe Ngai ũrĩa ũtũũraga tene na tene, nĩwe Mũmbi wa ituri ciothe cia thĩ. We ndooragwo nĩ hinya o na kana akanoga, naguo ũmenyo wake wa maũndũ gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũũtuĩria.
english: Haven’t you known? Haven’t you heard? The everlasting God, Yahweh, the Creator of the ends of the earth, doesn’t faint. He isn’t weary. His understanding is unsearchable. or, immersing  The Greek word (en) translated here as “in” could also be translated as “with” in some contexts.

kikuyu: no rĩrĩ, ũũ nĩguo Jehova ekuuga ũhoro ũkoniĩ mũthamaki ũrĩa ũikaragĩra gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene kĩa Daudi, marĩ hamwe na andũ othe arĩa maatigarire itũũra-inĩ rĩĩrĩ inene, na andũ a bũrũri wanyu, acio mũtaakuuanĩirio nao mũgĩtahwo:
english: Therefore all those who devour you will be devoured. All your adversaries, everyone of them, will go into captivity. Those who plunder you will be plunder. I will make all who prey on you become prey.

kikuyu: Watũmire thũ ciakwa ihũndũke ciũre, na niĩ ngĩniina arĩa maathũire.
english: You have also made my enemies turn their backs to me, that I might cut off those who hate me.

kikuyu: Ũrathi wa Gũũkĩrĩra Mũthamaki wa Turo
english: 1 Yahweh’s word came again to me, saying,

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩ Mũrungu mũnene, o we Mũthamaki mũnene ũkĩrĩte ngai ciothe.
english: Don’t you know that we will judge angels? How much more, things that pertain to this life?

kikuyu: Metuĩte ta andũ mekũhiũria mathanwa mateme mĩtĩ ya mũtitũ.
english: Don’t lift up your horn on high. Don’t speak with a stiff neck.”

kikuyu: Ndĩraigua irũithia rĩa kũnjonorithia, naguo ũmenyo wakwa nĩũranjĩkĩra hinya wa gũcookia.
english: I have heard the reproof which puts me to shame. The spirit of my understanding answers me.

kikuyu: Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo rĩathani rĩa mbere na rĩrĩa inene.
english: This is the first and great commandment.

kikuyu: We angũũraga kuuma mbaara-inĩ ĩrĩa ndũithagio, ngoima itagurarĩtio, o na gwakorwo nĩ andũ aingĩ mandũithagia.
english: He has redeemed my soul in peace from the battle that was against me, although there are many who oppose me.

kikuyu: Ũhithĩte ũthiũ waku nĩkĩ, na ũkariganĩrwo nĩ mathĩĩna maitũ na kũhinyĩrĩrio gwitũ?
english: Why do you hide your face, and forget our affliction and our oppression?

kikuyu: Jehova agĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa Isiraeli, nake agĩtũma morũũre werũ-inĩ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna, o nginya rĩrĩa rũciaro rũu ruothe rwehĩtie maitho-inĩ make rwathirire.
english: Moses and Eleazar the priest, with all the princes of the congregation, went out to meet them outside of the camp.

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo inyuĩ mwĩĩtaga atũũri a itũũra rĩrĩa inene itheru,
english: for they call themselves citizens of the holy city, and rely on the God of Israel; Yahweh of Armies is his name.

kikuyu: Njĩra ya mũndũ mũhĩtia nĩ njogomu, no mĩthiĩre ya mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ mahĩtia nĩ mĩrũngarũ.
english: A king who sits on the throne of judgment scatters away all evil with his eyes.

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũrĩa ũthingataga ũthingu na wendani nĩagĩĩaga na muoyo, na ũgaacĩru, na gĩtĩĩo.
english: He who follows after righteousness and kindness finds life, righteousness, and honor.

kikuyu: Kũrathimwo-rĩ, nĩ andũ arĩa marũmagia kĩrĩra gĩake, o arĩa mamũrongoragia na ngoro yothe.
english: Blessed are those who keep his statutes, who seek him with their whole heart.

kikuyu: Niĩ gũkua ndigũkua, no nĩngũtũũra muoyo, ngʼanage ũrĩa Jehova ekĩte.
english: Do good to your servant. I will live and I will obey your word.

kikuyu: “Ngamĩĩra ciao igaatuĩka cia gũtahwo, nacio ndũũru icio ciao nyingĩ cia ngʼombe ituĩke cia ndaho. Arĩa marĩ kũndũ kũraya nĩngamahurunjĩra mĩena yothe ĩrĩa yumaga rũhuho. na nĩngamarehithĩria mwanangĩko kuuma mĩena yothe,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: Their camels will be a booty, and the multitude of their livestock a plunder. I will scatter to all winds those who have the corners of their beards cut off; and I will bring their calamity from every side of them,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: Ngĩmarũithia na ngĩmetĩria kĩrumi. Nĩndahũũrire arũme amwe ao na ngĩmamunya njuĩrĩ. Ngĩtũma mehĩte mwĩhĩtwa makĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai, ngĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Menyai gũkaaneana airĩtu anyu mahikio nĩ ariũ ao, kana aanake anyu inyuĩ ene mahikie airĩtu ao.
english: I contended with them, cursed them, struck certain of them, plucked off their hair, and made them swear by God, “You shall not give your daughters to their sons, nor take their daughters for your sons, or for yourselves.

kikuyu: nakuo kũũmĩrĩria gũtũmaga tũgĩe na gwĩkindĩra; nakuo gwĩkindĩra gũtũmaga tũgĩe na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro.
english: and perseverance, proven character; and proven character, hope;

kikuyu: Mũirĩtu o wothe ũkaagaya gĩthaka mũhĩrĩga-inĩ o wothe wa Isiraeli, no nginya ahikĩre mũndũ wa nyũmba ya mũhĩrĩga wa ithe, nĩgeetha Mũisiraeli o wothe atũũre enyiitĩire igai rĩa maithe.
english: Every daughter who possesses an inheritance in any tribe of the children of Israel shall be wife to one of the family of the tribe of her father, that the children of Israel may each possess the inheritance of his fathers.

kikuyu: Nĩngamũingata mwehere mbere yakwa, o ta ũrĩa ndeekire ariũ a ithe wanyu othe, nĩo andũ a Efiraimu.’
english: We looked for peace, but no good came; and for a time of healing, and behold, dismay!

kikuyu: Indo iria ciombirwo itũũraga cietereire kũguũranĩrio gwa ciana cia Ngai irĩ na gũthethũka kũnene.
english: For the good which I desire, I don’t do; but the evil which I don’t desire, that I practice.

kikuyu: “ ‘Ndũkanakome na mũndũ mũrũme ta ũrĩa mũndũ akomaga na mũndũ-wa-nja; ũndũ ũcio ũrĩ magigi.
english: “ ‘You shall not lie with a man as with a woman. That is detestable.

kikuyu: “Na rĩrĩ, Babuloni na arĩa othe matũũraga Kalidei, ngaamacookereria ũũru wao mũkĩĩonagĩra, ũũru wothe ũrĩa maaneka kũu Zayuni,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: “I will give to Babylon and to all the inhabitants of Chaldea all their evil that they have done in Zion in your sight,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo ũthamaki nĩ wa Jehova, na nĩwe wathaga ndũrĩrĩ ciothe.
english: For the kingdom is Yahweh’s. He is the ruler over the nations.

kikuyu: Nĩmũkagĩa na irio nyingĩ cia kũrĩa, o nginya mũhũũne, na inyuĩ nĩmũkagoocaga rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova Ngai wanyu, ũrĩa ũmwĩkĩire maũndũ ma magegania; andũ akwa matigacooka gũconorithio rĩngĩ.
english: You will have plenty to eat and be satisfied, and will praise the name of Yahweh, your God, who has dealt wondrously with you; and my people will never again be disappointed.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo icooki rĩakwa nĩ ihũthũ, na mũrigo wakwa nĩ mũhũthũ.”
english: For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light.”

kikuyu: Atĩrĩrĩ, wee mũthamaki nĩũrutĩte uuge waku, ũkoiga atĩ rĩrĩa mũndũ o wothe akaigua mũgambo wa coro, na mĩtũrirũ, na thethe, na kĩnanda gĩa kĩnũbi, na kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto, na mĩtũrirũ ĩrĩa mĩariĩ, na ũini wa mĩthemba yothe no nginya egũithie thĩ, ahooe mũhianano ũcio wa thahabu,
english: You, O king, have made a decree that every man who hears the sound of the horn, flute, zither, lyre, harp, pipe, and all kinds of music shall fall down and worship the golden image;

kikuyu: Icio nĩcio irĩra cia watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo, na matuĩro ma ciira na mawatho marĩa Jehova aarĩkanĩire na andũ a Isiraeli Kĩrĩma-inĩ gĩa Sinai, akĩĩra Musa amamenyithanie kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli.
english: These are the statutes, ordinances, and laws, which Yahweh made between him and the children of Israel in Mount Sinai by Moses.

kikuyu: Nĩndĩĩhĩtĩte mwĩhĩtwa na ngagwatĩria, atĩ nĩndĩrĩrũmagĩrĩra mawatho maku ma ũthingu.
english: I have sworn, and have confirmed it, that I will obey your righteous ordinances.

kikuyu: rĩrĩa angĩkorwo ehĩtie ũguo na atuĩke mũhĩtia-rĩ, no nginya acookie kĩrĩa aiyĩte, kana atunyanĩte, kana kĩrĩa ehokeirwo, kana kĩndũ kĩorĩte agĩkĩona,
english: “ ‘Or if anyone swears rashly with his lips to do evil or to do good—whatever it is that a man might utter rashly with an oath, and it is hidden from him—when he knows of it, then he will be guilty of one of these.

kikuyu: Akĩmeetia kahengere ga kwandĩkwo, nake akĩandĩka atĩrĩ, “Rĩĩtwa rĩako nĩ Johana.” Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũkĩgegia andũ othe.
english: He asked for a writing tablet, and wrote, “His name is John.” They all marveled.

kikuyu: ũrĩa ũkaagarũra mĩĩrĩ ĩno iitũ mĩhinyaru nĩgeetha ĩhaananio na mwĩrĩ wake ũcio ũrĩ riiri, nĩ ũndũ wa hinya ũrĩa ũmũhotithagia gwatha maũndũ mothe.
english: who will change the body of our humiliation to be conformed to the body of his glory, according to the working by which he is able even to subject all things to himself.

kikuyu: 1 Mũtumia mũũgĩ nĩ gwaka akaga nyũmba yake, no mũtumia mũkĩĩgu nĩgũtharia atharagia nyũmba yake na moko make mwene.
english: The unfaithful will be repaid for his own ways; likewise a good man will be rewarded for his ways.

kikuyu: Tũũgagĩria ũũgĩ mũno, naguo nĩũrĩkwambararagia; ũhĩmbagĩrie, naguo nĩũrĩgũtĩĩithagia.
english: For if these things are yours and abound, they make you to not be idle or unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.

kikuyu: Kanitha nĩguo mwĩrĩ wake, na noguo ũiyũru wake, o we ũiyũrĩte maũndũ mothe o na kũndũ guothe.
english: which is his body, the fullness of him who fills all in all.

kikuyu: “Nũũ warekereirie njagĩ ĩthiiage ĩtarĩ mũũria? Nũũ wamĩohorire mĩhĩndo?
english: “Who has set the wild donkey free? Or who has loosened the bonds of the swift donkey,

kikuyu: Kiriathu-Baali (na nĩkuo Kiriathu-Jearimu), na Raba; matũũra meerĩ na tũtũũra twamo.
english: Kiriath Baal (also called Kiriath Jearim), and Rabbah; two cities with their villages.

kikuyu: Atĩrĩrĩ, gũtirĩ ũngĩ ũtariĩ tawe, Wee Jehova; Wee ũrĩ mũnene, narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩaku nĩ rĩrĩ ũhoti mũnene.
english: But I hope that you will know that we aren’t disqualified.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe nĩguo atuĩte gwĩka, nũũ ũngĩhota kũmũgirĩrĩria? Guoko gwake nĩgũtambũrũkĩtio, nũũ ũngĩhota gũgũthuna? Ũrathi wa Gũũkĩrĩra Afilisti
english: For Yahweh of Armies has planned, and who can stop it? His hand is stretched out, and who can turn it back?”

kikuyu: O ta ũguo wonire atĩ makinya na ciara ciarĩ cia rĩũmba rĩcine rĩtukanĩte na kĩgera-rĩ, noguo ũthamaki ũyũ ũgaakorwo ũrĩ mũgayũkanu; no rĩrĩ, nĩũgakorwo ũrĩ na hinya wa kĩgera thĩinĩ waguo, o ta ũguo wonire kĩgera kĩu gĩtukanĩte na rĩũmba.
english: Whereas you saw the feet and toes, part of potters’ clay and part of iron, it will be a divided kingdom; but there will be in it of the strength of the iron, because you saw the iron mixed with miry clay.

kikuyu: “Kaĩ gũkũ thĩ kũrĩ na haaro-ĩ, nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ marĩa matũmaga andũ mehie! Maũndũ ta macio no nginya moke, no mũndũ ũrĩa ũtũmaga moke kaĩ arĩ na haaro-ĩ!
english: Jesus came and touched them and said, “Get up, and don’t be afraid.”

kikuyu: Niĩ ndĩ na ũmenyo mũingĩ gũkĩra athuuri, nĩgũkorwo njathĩkagĩra kĩrĩra gĩaku.
english: I understand more than the aged, because I have kept your precepts.

kikuyu: JudaakĩĩraTamarumũtumiawamũriũatĩrĩ, “Thiĩũtũũreũrĩwandigwagwathoguomũciĩnginya mũrũ wakwa Shela agimare.” Tondũ eeciiririe atĩrĩ, “O nake Shela ahota gũkua ta ariũ a nyina.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Tamaru agĩthiĩ gũtũũra mũciĩ gwa ithe.
english: About this time, he went into the house to do his work, and there were none of the men of the house inside.

kikuyu: Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma arutwo acio ikũmi na eerĩ: Wa mbere nĩ Simoni (ũrĩa wĩtagwo Petero), na mũrũ wa nyina Anderea; na Jakubu mũrũ wa Zebedi, na mũrũ wa nyina Johana;
english: Now when John heard in the prison the works of Christ, he sent two of his disciples

kikuyu: Igongona cianyu nĩikamomorwo, na igongona cianyu cia gũcinĩrwo ũbumba ihehenjwo; na nĩngooragĩra andũ anyu hau mbere ya mĩhianano ĩyo yanyu.
english: Your altars will become desolate, and your incense altars will be broken. I will cast down your slain men before your idols.

kikuyu: “Mũrũ wa mũndũ, oya gathanju ka mũtĩ wandĩke igũrũ rĩako atĩrĩ, ‘Gaka nĩ ka Juda na andũ a Isiraeli arĩa makuruhanĩte nake.’ Ningĩ woe gathanju kangĩ ka mũtĩ wandĩke igũrũ rĩako atĩrĩ, ‘Gathanju ka Efiraimu, karĩa ka Jusufu na andũ othe a nyũmba ya Isiraeli arĩa makuruhanĩte nake.’
english: You will come up against my people Israel as a cloud to cover the land. It will happen in the latter days that I will bring you against my land, that the nations may know me when I am sanctified in you, Gog, before their eyes.”

kikuyu: Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiumĩrĩra andũ angĩ eerĩ ao, ahaana ũndũ ũngĩ, rĩrĩa maathiiaga mĩgũnda-inĩ.
english: After these things he was revealed in another form to two of them as they walked, on their way into the country.

kikuyu: Thikĩrĩriai kiugo kĩa Jehova, inyuĩ mwathanaga Sodomu; * 1:7 Ũndũ ũyũ wekĩkĩte rĩrĩa Senakeribu aatharĩkĩire Jerusalemu ( ).
english: Enter into the rock, and hide in the dust, from before the terror of Yahweh,  The word translated “Lord” is “Adonai.”  tin is a metal that is separated from silver during the refining and purification process.

kikuyu: Mũthenya ũcio-rĩ, Jehova nĩakaherithia maahinya ma kũu igũrũ, o kũu matu-inĩ, na aherithie athamaki a thĩ ĩno.
english: It will happen in that day that Yahweh will punish the army of the high ones on high, and the kings of the earth on the earth.

kikuyu: nĩwe watongoririe andũ ake magĩtuĩkanĩria werũ-inĩ, Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
english: to him who led his people through the wilderness, for his loving kindness endures forever;

kikuyu: Wee Ngai-rĩ, ũthingu waku ũkinyĩte o matu-inĩ, Wee wĩkĩte maũndũ manene. Wee Ngai-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩ ũhaana ta we?
english: Blessed be his glorious name forever! Let the whole earth be filled with his glory! Amen and amen.

kikuyu: Nyũmba ya mũndũ mũthingu ĩkoragwo na kĩgĩĩna kĩnene, no uumithio wa andũ aaganu ũmarehagĩra thĩĩna.
english: By mercy and truth iniquity is atoned for. By the fear of Yahweh men depart from evil.

kikuyu: “Nĩngagitĩra itũũra rĩĩrĩ inene na ndĩrĩhonokie, nĩ ũndũ wakwa na nĩ ũndũ wa Daudi ndungata yakwa!”
english: ‘For I will defend this city to save it, for my own sake, and for my servant David’s sake.’ ”

kikuyu: Namo merirĩria marĩkia kũgĩa nda, maciaraga mehia; namo mehia hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maakũra biũ, magaciara gĩkuũ.
english: Then the lust, when it has conceived, bears sin. The sin, when it is full grown, produces death.

kikuyu: “ ‘Nĩ ũndũ ũcio no nginya mũkũũranage nyamũ iria itarĩ thaahu na iria irĩ thaahu, na nyoni iria itarĩ thaahu na iria irĩ thaahu. Mũtikanethaahie na nyamũ kana nyoni o na ĩrĩkũ, kana kĩndũ o gĩothe gĩthiiagĩra thĩ, iria ciothe ndaamũranirie tondũ irĩ thaahu harĩ inyuĩ. No nginya mũtuĩke atheru
english: in gentleness correcting those who oppose him. Perhaps God may give them repentance leading to a full knowledge of the truth,

kikuyu: Ta thikĩrĩriai, inyuĩ atongoria a nyũmba ya Jakubu, o inyuĩ aathani a nyũmba ya Isiraeli, inyuĩ mũmenaga kĩhooto, na mũkoogomia maũndũ marĩa ma ma;
english: Now why do you cry out aloud? Is there no king in you? Has your counselor perished, that pains have taken hold of you as of a woman in travail?

kikuyu: Kwarooka gũkĩa Mũsamaria ũcio akĩruta dinari igĩrĩ, agĩcinengera mwene nyũmba ĩyo ya ageni, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mũmenyagĩrĩre, na ndacooka nĩngagũcookeria kĩrĩa kĩngĩ ũgaakorwo ũhũthĩrĩte.’
english: On the next day, when he departed, he took out two denarii, gave them to the host, and said to him, ‘Take care of him. Whatever you spend beyond that, I will repay you when I return.’

kikuyu: Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ marĩa matahotekaga nĩ andũ nĩmahotekaga nĩ Ngai.” Nake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũtigĩte maũndũ maitũ mothe tũgakũrũmĩrĩra!”
english: But he said, “The things which are impossible with men are possible with God.”

kikuyu: Inyuĩ andũ akwa, mwĩhumbei nguo ya ikũnia, na mwĩgaragarie mũhu-inĩ; rĩrai na kĩgi, ta ũrĩa mwana wa mũmwe arĩragĩrwo, nĩgũkorwo mwanangi ũcio agaatũhithũkĩra o rĩmwe.
english: Daughter of my people, clothe yourself with sackcloth, and wallow in ashes! Mourn, as for an only son, most bitter lamentation, for the destroyer will suddenly come on us.

kikuyu: “ ‘Rĩrĩa mũndũ-wa-nja ekuura ihinda-inĩ rĩake rĩa mweri, nĩagaikara mĩthenya mũgwanja arĩ na thaahu, nake mũndũ o wothe ũngĩmũhutia, atiinde arĩ na thaahu o nginya hwaĩ-inĩ.
english: “ ‘If a woman has a discharge, and her discharge in her flesh is blood, she shall be in her impurity seven days. Whoever touches her shall be unclean until the evening.

kikuyu: Atwaragwo mbĩrĩra-inĩ, nayo mbĩrĩra yake ĩkarangagĩrwo.
english: Yet he will be borne to the grave. Men will keep watch over the tomb.

kikuyu: Nĩagianire na mũraika, na akĩmũtooria; akĩrĩra na akĩmũthaitha amũrathime. Aamũkorire Betheli na makĩaranĩria nake kũu:
english: “Yet I am Yahweh your God from the land of Egypt; and you shall acknowledge no god but me, and besides me there is no savior.

kikuyu: Paũlũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũbatithio wa Johana warĩ ũbatithio wa kwĩrira kwa mehia. Eeraga andũ metĩkie ũrĩa ũgũũka thuutha wake, nake nĩwe Jesũ.” Rĩrĩa maaiguire ũguo, makĩbatithio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani Jesũ.
english: Paul said, “John indeed baptized with the baptism of repentance, saying to the people that they should believe in the one who would come after him, that is, in Christ Jesus.”†

kikuyu: Ĩyo yothe nĩyo mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya Isiraeli, na ũguo nĩguo ithe wao aameerire rĩrĩa aamarathimaga, akĩhe o mũndũ kĩrathimo kĩrĩa kĩamwagĩrĩire. Gĩkuũ kĩa Jakubu Ningĩ Jakubu akĩmahe mawatho maya: “Ndĩ hakuhĩ gũkua. Mũgaathika harĩa maithe makwa mathikĩtwo, ngurunga-inĩ ĩrĩa ĩrĩ gĩthaka-inĩ kĩa Efironi ũrĩa Mũhiti,
english: All these are the twelve tribes of Israel, and this is what their father spoke to them, and blessed them. He blessed everyone according to his own blessing.

kikuyu: Ariũ a Zibeoni maarĩ: Aia, na Ana. Ũyũ nĩwe Ana ũrĩa wonire ithima cia maaĩ mahiũ werũ-inĩ rĩrĩa arĩithagia ndigiri cia ithe Zibeoni.
english: These are the children of Zibeon: Aiah and Anah. This is Anah who found the hot springs in the wilderness, as he fed the donkeys of Zibeon his father.

kikuyu: Ihooya rĩa kũũria Ũteithio Thaburi ya Agendi
english: A Song of Ascents.

kikuyu: riũa rĩathage mũthenya, Wendo wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
english: the sun to rule by day, for his loving kindness endures forever;

kikuyu: Tondũ we nĩamenyaga maũndũ marĩa meekaga, amangʼaũranagia ũtukũ magathuthĩka.
english: Therefore he takes knowledge of their works. He overturns them in the night, so that they are destroyed.

kikuyu: mwene nyũmba ĩyo no nginya athiĩ akeere mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩnyonete kĩndũ kĩhaana ta ũgumu thĩinĩ wa nyũmba yakwa.’
english: But if the itch spreads in the skin after his cleansing,

kikuyu: Njĩra cia andũ arĩa aaganu nĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩ magigi harĩ Jehova, no nĩendete andũ arĩa mathingataga ũthingu.
english: A man’s heart plans his course, but Yahweh directs his steps.

kikuyu: Ũkai ciana ciakwa, mũthikĩrĩrie ũrĩa nguuga; nĩngũmũruta gwĩtigĩra Jehova.
english: Come, you children, listen to me. I will teach you the fear of Yahweh.

kikuyu: “Nafitali nĩ ta thiiya ya mũgoma ĩrekereirio, ĩrĩa ĩciaraga tũthiiya tũthaka.
english: Now therefore don’t be afraid. I will provide for you and your little ones.” He comforted them, and spoke kindly to them.

kikuyu: O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “ ‘Ti-itherũ, o ta ũrĩa niĩ ndũũraga muoyo, iru o rĩothe nĩrĩgaturio mbere yakwa; naruo rũrĩmĩ o ruothe nĩrũkoimbũrĩra Ngai,’ ũguo nĩguo Mwathani ekuuga.”
english: For it has been reported to me concerning you, my brothers, by those who are from Chloe’s household, that there are contentions among you.

kikuyu: Aiguaga o mĩgambo ya kũmakania mũno; hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maũndũ mothe moneka ta marĩ mega-rĩ, atunyani makamũtharĩkĩra.
english: A sound of terrors is in his ears. In prosperity the destroyer will come on him.

kikuyu: Ndoigire ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa gũcaĩra athĩĩni, no oigire ũguo nĩ ũndũ aarĩ mũici, tondũ nĩwe wakuuaga mũhuko wa mbeeca, na nĩaiyaga imwe akahũthĩra we mwene. Nake Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Tiganai nake, araigĩte maguta macio nĩ ũndũ wa mũthenya ũrĩa ngaathikwo.
english: Now he said this, not because he cared for the poor, but because he was a thief, and having the money box, used to steal what was put into it.

kikuyu: tondũ wa gwĩtigĩra kĩrĩndĩ, o na gwĩtigĩra kũmenwo nĩ mĩhĩrĩga ngagĩkira ki na ndiume nja-rĩ,
english: because I feared the great multitude, and the contempt of families terrified me, so that I kept silence, and didn’t go out of the door—

kikuyu: “Thiĩ ũkaanĩrĩre ũkĩiguagwo nĩ andũ a Jerusalemu, ũmeere atĩrĩ: * 1:1 Anathothu rĩarĩ itũũra rĩmwe rĩa matũũra mana ma Alawii marĩa maarĩ bũrũri wa Benjamini ( -18).
english: “Go and proclaim in the ears of Jerusalem, saying, ‘Yahweh says, “I remember for you the kindness of your youth, your love as a bride, how you went after me in the wilderness, in a land that was not sown.

kikuyu: Erekeria ngoro yakwa kũrĩ kĩrĩra gĩaku, nĩguo ĩtige kwerekera ũhoro-inĩ wa gwĩtongia.
english: Turn my heart toward your statutes, not toward selfish gain.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo ciũmbe icio ciathĩrĩirio itũũre itarĩ kĩene na ti ũndũ wa gwĩthuurĩra cio nyene, no nĩ
english: But if what I don’t desire, that I do, it is no more I that do it, but sin which dwells in me.

kikuyu: “Ĩrai andũ a Isiraeli ũũ, ‘Gatagatĩ-inĩ ka nyamũ ciothe iria irĩ bũrũri-inĩ-rĩ, ici nĩcio mũngĩrĩa: No mũrĩe nyamũ o yothe ĩrĩ mahũngũ marekanĩtie gatagatĩ biũ na ĩcookagia ithagumia.
english: “Speak to the children of Israel, saying, ‘These are the living things which you may eat among all the animals that are on the earth.

kikuyu: Nĩndũũrĩte hĩndĩ ndaaya gatagatĩ-inĩ ka arĩa mathũire thayũ.
english: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem. Those who love you will prosper.

kikuyu: Ũmũhe ũhoti ũmwe waku, nĩgeetha kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe kĩa andũ a Isiraeli kĩmwathĩkagĩre. Nake arũgamage mbere ya Eleazaru ũcio mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai, ũrĩa ũrĩmũtuĩragĩria ũhoro na ũndũ wa kũũria Urimu mbere ya Jehova. Rĩrĩa aathana, hamwe na kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe kĩa andũ a Isiraeli makoimagara, ningĩ aathana rĩngĩ makainũka.”
english: The sons of Judah after their families were: of Shelah, the family of the Shelanites; of Perez, the family of the Perezites; of Zerah, the family of the Zerahites.

kikuyu: Thikĩrĩria! Thikĩrĩria mũraramo wa mũgambo wake, mũrurumo ũrĩa uumaga kanua gake.
english: Hear, oh, hear the noise of his voice, the sound that goes out of his mouth.

kikuyu: Tondũ tũrĩ ciĩga cia mwĩrĩ wake.
english: because we are members of his body, of his flesh and bones.

kikuyu: Ageni arĩa angĩ makĩambĩrĩria kwĩrana atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ ũyũ akĩrĩ ũ, ũrarekanĩra o na mehia?”
english: Those who sat at the table with him began to say to themselves, “Who is this who even forgives sins?”

kikuyu: Atĩrĩrĩ, o na mũkũyũ ũngĩaga kũruta kĩro, nayo mĩthabibũ yaage thabibũ, o naguo mũtamaiyũ wage maciaro, nayo mĩgũnda yaage irio; o na kũngĩaga ngʼondu gĩcegũ na kwage ngʼombe ciugũ-inĩ-rĩ,
english: For even though the fig tree doesn’t flourish, nor fruit be in the vines, the labor of the olive fails, the fields yield no food, the flocks are cut off from the fold, and there is no herd in the stalls,

kikuyu: Teithanagiai mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ maũndũ marĩa mamũritũhagĩra, na mweka ũguo-rĩ, nĩmũrĩhingagia watho wa Kristũ.
english: Bear one another’s burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ.

kikuyu: Ihingo ciaku igũtũũra irĩ hingũre, itirĩ hĩndĩ ikaahingwo mũthenya kana ũtukũ, nĩgeetha andũ makũrehagĩre ũtonga wa ndũrĩrĩ, athamaki ao marũmanĩrĩire mũtongoro wa ũhootani.
english: Your gates also shall be open continually; they shall not be shut day nor night, that men may bring to you the wealth of the nations, and their kings led captive.

kikuyu: Githĩ to amĩĩrire atĩrĩ, ‘Thondekera irio cia hwaĩ-inĩ, na wĩhaarĩrie ũnjikarie ngĩrĩa na ngĩnyua; na thuutha ũcio no ũrĩe na ũnyue’? Ningĩ no agĩcookerie ndungata ĩyo ngaatho nĩ gwĩka ũrĩa ĩĩrĩtwo ĩĩke?
english: Wouldn’t he rather tell him, ‘Prepare my supper, clothe yourself properly, and serve me while I eat and drink. Afterward you shall eat and drink’?

kikuyu: “Rĩu-rĩ, ũngĩhota atĩa kuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Niĩ ndiĩthaahĩtie; ndirũmĩrĩire kĩrĩra kĩa Mabaali’? Ta rora wone mĩtugo yaku kũu gĩtuamba-inĩ; wĩcũũranie wega maũndũ marĩa wĩkĩte. Wee ũhaana ta moori ya ngamĩĩra ĩgĩcangacanga kũndũ na kũndũ,
english: “How can you say, ‘I am not defiled. I have not gone after the Baals’? See your way in the valley.  The Hebrew word rendered “God” is “אֱֹלהִ ֑ים” (Elohim).  i.e., the Know what you have done. You are a swift dromedary traversing her ways,

kikuyu: Anabii marathaga mohoro ma maheeni, nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai magaathana ũrĩa mekwenda, nao andũ akwa ũguo nĩguo mendaga. No inyuĩ-rĩ, kĩrĩkĩrĩro-inĩ kĩa maũndũ macio mũgeeka atĩa?
english: The prophets prophesy falsely, and the priests rule by their own authority; and my people love to have it so. What will you do in the end of it?

kikuyu: Jehova nĩanjarĩirie ũhoro ũcio agwatĩirie mũno, na akĩngaania ndikarũmĩrĩre njĩra cia andũ acio. Akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ:
english: If anyone speaks, let it be as it were the very words of God. If anyone serves, let it be as of the strength which God supplies, that in all things God may be glorified through Jesus Christ, to whom belong the glory and the dominion forever and ever. Amen.

kikuyu: Inyuĩ nĩmũnogetie Jehova na ciugo cianyu. No mũrooria atĩrĩ, “Tũmũnogetie atĩa?” Mũmũnogetie na kuuga atĩrĩ, “Othe arĩa mekaga ũũru nĩmagĩrĩire maitho-inĩ ma Jehova, na nĩakenagio nĩo.” Ningĩ mũkooria atĩrĩ, “Ngai wa kĩhooto-rĩ, akĩrĩ ha?”
english: You have wearied Yahweh with your words. Yet you say, ‘How have we wearied him?’ In that you say, ‘Everyone who does evil is good in Yahweh’s sight, and he delights in them;’ or ‘Where is the God of justice?’

kikuyu: Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, ndikũnyua rĩngĩ ndibei ya maciaro ma mũthabibũ kuuma rĩu nginya mũthenya ũrĩa ngaamĩnyuanĩra na inyuĩ ĩrĩ njerũ ũthamaki-inĩ wa Baba.” Na maarĩkia kũina rwĩmbo-rĩ, makiumagara magĩthiĩ Kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ.
english: For to everyone who has will be given, and he will have abundance, but from him who doesn’t have, even that which he has will be taken away.

kikuyu: Handũ ha ũguo, magaatungatagĩra Jehova Ngai wao, na Daudi mũthamaki wao, ũrĩa niĩ ngaamarahũrĩra.
english: but they will serve Yahweh their God, and David their king, whom I will raise up to them.

kikuyu: Mawatho maku matũũraga nginya ũmũthĩ, nĩgũkorwo indo ciothe nĩwe itungataga.
english: Your laws remain to this day, for all things serve you.

kikuyu: O ta ũrĩa mũtĩ wa mũtamaiyũ ũikaraga wainainio, na o ta ũrĩa mũtĩ wa mũthabibũ ũikaraga thabibũ ciahaarwo hĩndĩ ya magetha, ũguo noguo ũhoro ũgaikara gũkũ thĩ na ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ ciothe.
english: For it will be so within the earth among the peoples, as the shaking of an olive tree, as the gleanings when the vintage is done.

kikuyu: Nacio icigĩrĩra ikĩũra ciothe, nacio irĩma ikĩaga gũcooka kuoneka.
english: Every island fled away, and the mountains were not found.

kikuyu: Mũthenya ũcio, kũndũ kũrĩa guothe kwarĩ mĩthabibũ 1,000 ĩngĩendirio cekeri 1,000† ya betha, gũgaakũra o congʼe na mĩtĩ ya mĩigua.
english: It will happen in that day that every place where there were a thousand vines worth a thousand silver shekels,‡ will be for briers and thorns.

kikuyu: Ti-itherũ nĩnyonete kũhinyĩrĩrio kwa andũ akwa kũu bũrũri wa Misiri. Nĩnjiguĩte gũcaaya kwao, na nĩnjikũrũkĩte thĩ nĩguo ndĩmohorithie. Rĩu ũka nĩngũgũtũma ũcooke Misiri.’
english: I have surely seen the affliction of my people who are in Egypt, and have heard their groaning. I have come down to deliver them. Now come, I will send you into Egypt.’*

kikuyu: Mahĩndĩ makwa matiahithĩkĩte harĩwe, rĩrĩa ndoombĩirwo kũrĩa kũhitharu. Rĩrĩa ndanyiitithanagio hamwe ndĩ thĩ kũrĩa kũriku mũno-rĩ,
english: My frame wasn’t hidden from you, when I was made in secret, woven together in the depths of the earth.

kikuyu: Njĩra ya Jehova nĩ rĩũrĩro rĩa andũ arĩa athingu, no nĩ mwanangĩko harĩ arĩa mekaga ũũru.
english: The way of Yahweh is a stronghold to the upright, but it is a destruction to the workers of iniquity.

kikuyu: Wee ũũkaga gũteithia andũ arĩa mekaga maũndũ marĩa magĩrĩire makenete, o acio maririkanaga njĩra ciaku. No rĩrĩa twagire gũcirũmĩrĩra tũgĩthiĩ na mbere na kwĩhia-rĩ, wee nĩwarakarire. Ithuĩ-rĩ, tũngĩkĩhonoka atĩa?
english: You meet him who rejoices and does righteousness, those who remember you in your ways. Behold, you were angry, and we sinned. We have been in sin for a long time. Shall we be saved?

kikuyu: “ ‘Andũ a Bethi-Togarima nĩmakũũranagia indo ciaku cia wonjoria na mbarathi cia wĩra, na mbarathi cia ita, o na nyũmbũ ciao.
english: “ ‘ “They of the house of Togarmah traded for your wares with horses, war horses, and mules.

kikuyu: Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩnene gĩgĩthiĩ harĩ Pilato, gĩkĩmũũria eeke o ũrĩa aamenyerete gwĩka.
english: The multitude, crying aloud, began to ask him to do as he always did for them.

kikuyu: no atongoria acio othe makĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩtwĩhĩtĩte na mwĩhĩtwa tũkĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli, na tondũ ũcio tũtingĩmahutia.
english: But all the princes said to all the congregation, “We have sworn to them by Yahweh, the God of Israel. Now therefore we may not touch them.

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩhutia ũrĩrĩ ũcio no nginya athambie nguo ciake na ethambe na maaĩ, na atiinde arĩ na thaahu o nginya hwaĩ-inĩ.
english: Whoever touches his bed shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the evening.

kikuyu: “Angĩkorwo nĩũtengʼeranĩtie na andũ marathiĩ na magũrũ nao magakũhũmia-rĩ, wakĩhota atĩa gũcindana na mbarathi? Angĩkorwo nĩũhĩngagwo ũkĩgerera bũrũri ũrĩ thayũ-rĩ, ũgaakĩhota atĩa gũtũrĩkania ihinga iria irĩ hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia Jorodani?
english: “If you have run with the footmen, and they have wearied you, then how can you contend with horses? Though in a land of peace you are secure, yet how will you do in the pride of the Jordan?
