kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo ndikenagio nĩ gĩkuũ kĩa mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ, ũguo nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga. Mwĩrirei mũtũũre muoyo!
english: For I have no pleasure in the death of him who dies,” says the Lord Yahweh. “Therefore turn yourselves, and live!

kikuyu: Mũndũ o wothe angĩkorwo nĩ wa gũtahwo, nĩegũtahwo athiĩ. Mũndũ o wothe angĩkorwo nĩ wa kũũragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora-rĩ, ndarĩ hĩndĩ atakooragwo na rũhiũ. Ũguo nĩkuonania atĩ andũ arĩa aamũre nĩmabataire gũkirĩrĩria, na marĩ na wĩtĩkio. Nyamũ kuuma na Thĩ
english: If anyone is to go into captivity, he will go into captivity. If anyone is to be killed with the sword, he must be killed.‡ Here is the endurance and the faith of the saints.

kikuyu: Ici nĩcio ciarĩ mbarĩ cia Efiraimu; arĩa maatarirwo maarĩ andũ 32,500. Icio nĩcio njiaro cia Jusufu kũringana na mbarĩ ciao.
english: These are the families of the sons of Ephraim according to those who were counted of them, thirty-two thousand five hundred. These are the sons of Joseph after their families.

kikuyu: Nũũ wanyu ũgũthikĩrĩria ũhoro ũyũ, kana aũrũmbũiye mahinda marĩa magooka?
english: Who is there among you who will give ear to this? Who will listen and hear for the time to come?

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo Jehova Ngai wanyu nĩahũithirie maaĩ ma Jorodani mbere yanyu nginya rĩrĩa mwarikire kũringa. Jehova Ngai wanyu eekire Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani o ta ũrĩa eekire Iria Itune rĩrĩa aarĩhũithirie mbere iitũ nginya rĩrĩa twarĩkirie kũringa.
english: Then the two men returned, descended from the mountain, crossed the river, and came to Joshua the son of Nun. They told him all that had happened to them.

kikuyu: Nĩmakenire nĩ kũigua ũhoro ũcio, na makĩgooca Ngai. Na matiigana gũcooka kwaria ũhoro wa kũrũa nao atĩ nĩguo maharaganie bũrũri ũrĩa andũ a Rubeni na Gadi matũũraga. Nao andũ a Rubeni na Gadi magĩĩta kĩgongona kĩu ũũ: Mũira Gatagatĩ Gaitũ atĩ Jehova nĩwe Ngai.
english: The thing pleased the children of Israel; and the children of Israel blessed God, and spoke no more of going up against them to war, to destroy the land in which the children of Reuben and the children of Gad lived.

kikuyu: O akĩaragia-rĩ, mũkinyia-ũhoro ũngĩ agĩũka, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Akalidei‡ meyũmba mbũtũ ithatũ, maatharĩkĩra ngamĩĩra ciaku na macitaha, maathiĩ nacio. Ndungata nacio maciũraga na rũhiũ rwa njora; na no niĩ nyiki ndahonoka, ndagĩũka gũkũrehere ũhoro!”
english: While he was still speaking, another also came and said, “The Chaldeans made three bands, and swept down on the camels, and have taken them away, yes, and killed the servants with the edge of the sword; and I alone have escaped to tell you.”

kikuyu: Ũrathi wa Mbere wa Balamu Nake Balamu akĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ, “Njakĩra igongona mũgwanja haha, na ũhaarĩrie ndegwa mũgwanja na ndũrũme mũgwanja.”
english: 1 Balaam said to Balak, “Build here seven altars for me, and prepare here seven bulls and seven rams for me.”

kikuyu: Inyuĩ mũtuĩragia Maandĩko tondũ mwĩciiragia atĩ na ũndũ wamo nĩmwĩgwatĩire muoyo wa tene na tene. Maandĩko macio nĩmo moimbũraga ũhoro ũrĩa ũngoniĩ,
english: “You search the Scriptures, because you think that in them you have eternal life; and these are they which testify about me.

kikuyu: Waingĩhirie ariũ ao o ta njata cia matu-inĩ na ũkĩmakinyia bũrũri ũrĩa werĩte maithe mao matoonye makawĩgwatĩre ũtuĩke wao.
english: You also multiplied their children as the stars of the sky, and brought them into the land concerning which you said to their fathers that they should go in to possess it.

kikuyu: “Gũtirĩ mũtino wonekete harĩ Jakubu, gũtirĩ ihooru rĩonetwo thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli. Jehova Ngai wao arĩ hamwe nao; kayũ ka mũthamaki karĩ thĩinĩ wao.
english: He has not seen iniquity in Jacob. Neither has he seen perverseness in Israel. Yahweh his God is with him. The shout of a king is among them.

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũcio Danieli, na nĩwe mũthamaki eetire Beliteshazaru, nĩonekire arĩ na meciiria makuũku, na ũmenyo, na ũtaũku, o na ningĩ ũhoti wa gũtaũra irooto, na gũtaarĩria ndaĩ, na gũtuithania maũndũ marĩa maritũ. Tũmana Danieli etwo na nĩegũkwĩra ũrĩa maandĩko macio moigĩte.” Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Danieli akĩrehwo mbere ya mũthamaki, nake mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩwe Danieli, ũmwe wa andũ arĩa baba, ũrĩa warĩ mũthamaki aarehire gũkũ matahĩtwo kuuma Juda?
english: Then they came near, and spoke before the king concerning the king’s decree: “Haven’t you signed a decree that every man who makes a petition to any god or man within thirty days, except to you, O king, shall be cast into the den of lions?” The king answered, “This thing is true, according to the law of the Medes and Persians, which doesn’t alter.”

kikuyu: “Meere atĩrĩ, ‘Ũũ nĩguo Jehova ekuuga, “ ‘Andũ mangĩgũa thĩ-rĩ, githĩ maticookaga gũũkĩra? Mũndũ angĩhĩtia njĩra-rĩ, githĩ ndamĩcookagĩrĩra? Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩte andũ aya mathiĩ na mbere kũũhutatĩra? Andũ a Jerusalemu maahutatagĩra nĩkĩ? Matũũrĩte marũmĩtie maũndũ ma maheeni, makarega gũcooka.
english: “Moreover you shall tell them, ‘Yahweh says: “ ‘Do men fall, and not rise up again? Does one turn away, and not return?

kikuyu: mwaka-inĩ wa mbere wa wathani wake-rĩ, niĩ Danieli nĩndataũkĩirwo kuuma maandĩko-inĩ matheru nĩ kiugo kĩrĩa Jehova eerĩte mũnabii Jeremia atĩ Jerusalemu nĩgũgakira ihooru mĩaka mĩrongo mũgwanja. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩĩhũgũrĩra Jehova Ngai, ngĩmũhooya, ngĩmũthaithaga ndĩhingĩte kũrĩa irio, na ndĩhumbĩte nguo ya ikũnia, na ngehurĩria mũhu mũtwe.
english: I saw the vision. Now it was so, that when I saw, I was in the citadel of Susa, which is in the province of Elam. I saw in the vision, and I was by the river Ulai. or, Hell  or, messengers (here and wherever angels are mentioned)

kikuyu: rwa gũtũhonokia kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciitũ, na kuuma kũrĩ guoko kwa arĩa othe matũmenaga,
english: salvation from our enemies and from the hand of all who hate us;

kikuyu: Nũũ ũngĩaria na atũme ũndũ ũcio ũhinge, Mwathani ataathanĩte gũtuĩke ũguo?
english: Who is he who says, and it comes to pass, when the Lord doesn’t command it?

kikuyu: Ndarongoririe Jehova, nake akĩnjĩtĩka, akĩndeithũra kuuma kũrĩ maũndũ marĩa mothe maanjĩkagĩra guoya.
english: I sought Yahweh, and he answered me, and delivered me from all my fears.

kikuyu: Wee nĩwe kĩĩhitho gĩakwa; nĩũkangitĩra hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna, na ũũthiũrũrũkĩrie na nyĩmbo cia ũhonokio.
english: He gathers the waters of the sea together as a heap. He lays up the deeps in storehouses.

kikuyu: Ndũrĩrĩ ciothe iria ciakũũĩ, nĩcigegetio nĩwe; nĩũkinyĩte mũthia wa kũguoyohithia, nawe ndũgacooka kuonwo rĩngĩ.’ ” Ũrathi wa Gũũkĩrĩra Sidoni
english: All those who know you among the peoples will be astonished at you. You have become a terror, and you will exist no more.” ’ ”

kikuyu: “O rĩngĩ, ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaanaine na neti ĩrĩa yaikirio iria-inĩ, nayo ĩgĩtega thamaki cia mĩthemba yothe.
english: “Again, the Kingdom of Heaven is like a dragnet that was cast into the sea and gathered some fish of every kind,

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwakuĩte nĩ ũndũ wa mehia manyu na mũgaikara ta mũtaruĩte nĩ ũndũ wa mũtũũrĩre wanyu wa mehia-rĩ, Ngai nĩatũmire mũgĩe na muoyo hamwe na Kristũ. Ngai nĩatũrekeire mehia maitũ mothe,
english: You were dead through your trespasses and the uncircumcision of your flesh. He made you alive together with him, having forgiven us all our trespasses,

kikuyu: Mũndũ onaga mĩthiĩre yake yothe ĩrĩ mĩega, no Jehova nĩwe ũthimaga matanya.
english: A servant who deals wisely will rule over a son who causes shame, and shall have a part in the inheritance among the brothers.

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo arĩĩu na andũ arĩa akoroku matuĩkaga athĩĩni,
english: for the drunkard and the glutton shall become poor; and drowsiness clothes them in rags.

kikuyu: Amerari maamũrirwo mamenyagĩrĩre buremu ya hema ĩrĩa yaamũrĩtwo, na mĩgĩĩko yayo, na itugĩ, na itina ciacio, o na indo ciothe ciayo cia wĩra, na indo ciothe ciakonainie na mũhũthĩrĩre wacio,
english: He set a tax upon the people of one hundred talents of silver and one talent of gold.

kikuyu: Githĩ to rĩu wanjĩta ũkiugaga: ‘Baba, wee mũrata wakwa kuuma ndĩ o mũnini,
english: Will you not from this time cry to me, ‘My Father, you are the guide of my youth!’?

kikuyu: Mehia nĩmahorohagĩrio nĩ wendo na wĩhokeku, na nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra Jehova-rĩ, mũndũ nĩeheragĩra ũũru. Rĩrĩa mĩthiĩre ya mũndũ yakenia Jehova-rĩ, atũmaga o na thũ ciake itũũranie nake na thayũ.
english: Children’s children are the crown of old men; the glory of children is their parents.

kikuyu: “ ‘Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio angĩhonio mũrimũ ũcio wa kuura, nĩageterera mĩthenya mũgwanja nĩguo ambĩrĩrie gũtherio gwake; no nginya athambie nguo ciake na ethambe na maaĩ, matahĩtwo o hĩndĩ ĩyo, nake nĩagathirwo nĩ thaahu.
english: “ ‘When he who has a discharge is cleansed of his discharge, then he shall count to himself seven days for his cleansing, and wash his clothes; and he shall bathe his flesh in running water, and shall be clean.

kikuyu: “ ‘Mũhaka wanyu wa mwena wa ithũĩro ũgaakorwo ũrĩ hũgũrũrũ cia Iria rĩrĩa Inene. Ũcio nĩguo ũgaatuĩka mũhaka wanyu wa mwena wa ithũĩro.
english: “ ‘For the western border, you shall have the great sea and its border. This shall be your west border.

kikuyu: “ ‘Nĩmagakira ihooru, marĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka mabũrũri marĩa manangĩtwo, magakira ihooru, namo matũũra mao manene magaakorwo marĩ thĩinĩ wa matũũra manene marĩa manangĩku.
english: Thus it was beautiful in its greatness, in the length of its branches; for its root was by many waters.

kikuyu: Ihooya rĩa kũũria Ũteithio Thaburi ya Daudi
english: For the Chief Musician; upon an eight-stringed lyre. A Psalm of David.

kikuyu: Mũthenya ũmwe-rĩ, Naomi, nyaciarawe wa Ruthu, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwarĩ wakwa, githĩ ndi- agĩrĩirwo ngũcarĩrie mũciĩ waku, kũrĩa wee ũngĩona maũndũ mega?
english: In the days when the judges judged, there was a famine in the land. A certain man of Bethlehem Judah went to live in the country of Moab with his wife and his two sons.

kikuyu: Igũrũ riumbũraga riiri wa Mũrungu; namo matu mamemerekagia wĩra wa moko make.
english: The heavens declare the glory of God. The expanse shows his handiwork.

kikuyu: Kiugo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩanginyĩrĩire, ngĩĩrwo atĩrĩ:
english: Yahweh’s word came to me, saying,

kikuyu: Ahehenjaga arĩa marĩ ũhoti atekũũria mũndũ na akarũgamia andũ angĩ ithenya rĩao.
english: He breaks mighty men in pieces in ways past finding out, and sets others in their place.

kikuyu: “Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Mũthenya ũcio-rĩ, nĩngakwamũkĩra, wee ndungata yakwaZerubabelimũrũwaShealitieli,’ ũguonĩguoJehovaekuuga. ‘Ningĩnĩngagũtuatagĩcũhĩgĩakwa gĩakĩara, gĩkururerũũrirwakwa, nĩgũkorwonĩngũthuurĩte,’ ũguonĩguoJehovaMwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga.” * 2:17 Rũhuho rũhiũ na mbura ya mbembe ciatũmagĩrwo nĩ Ngai kũhũũra andũ nĩ ũndũ wa ũremi wao.
english: In that day, says Yahweh of Armies, I will take you, Zerubbabel my servant, the son of Shealtiel,’ says Yahweh, ‘and will make you like a signet ring, for I have chosen you,’ says Yahweh of Armies.”

kikuyu: Nĩũmahũũnĩtie na irio cia maithori; ũtũmĩte manyue maithori maiyũrĩte mbakũri riita.
english: When Judas heard of the cruelty done to his fellow countrymen, giving command to the men that were with him

kikuyu: Nĩarĩhumbaga kanjũ ya gatani ĩrĩa nyamũre, na thuruarĩ cia thĩinĩ cia gatani iriganie na mwĩrĩ wake, nĩarĩĩhotoraga mũcibi ũrĩa wa gatani, na akeoha kĩremba kĩrĩa gĩa gatani. Icio nĩcio nguo iria nyamũre; nĩ ũndũ ũcio no nginya ethambe na maaĩ mbere ya gũciĩhumba.*
english: He shall put on the holy linen tunic. He shall have the linen trousers on his body, and shall put on the linen sash, and he shall be clothed with the linen turban. They are the holy garments. He shall bathe his body in water, and put them on.

kikuyu: Thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩ kũrĩ mĩthemba yothe ya irio njega o na maguta, no mũndũ mũkĩĩgu arĩĩaga kĩrĩa gĩothe arĩ nakĩo.
english: There is precious treasure and oil in the dwelling of the wise, but a foolish man swallows it up.

kikuyu: Nĩngũtũũria wendo wakwa harĩ we nginya tene, na kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa nake gĩtũũre kĩrĩ gĩa kwĩhokeka.
english: I will keep my loving kindness for him forever more. My covenant will stand firm with him.

kikuyu: Barabara iria njariĩ itigĩtwo itarĩ andũ, na agendi magatiga kũgerera njĩra icio. Kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa maarĩkanĩire nĩgĩthũkie, na aira a kĩo makanyararwo, gũtirĩ o na mũndũ ũmwe ũraheo gĩtĩĩo.
english: For Yahweh has a day of vengeance, a year of recompense for the cause of Zion.

kikuyu: Andũ arĩa athingu marĩ bata mũno harĩ Jehova, nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndakenaga rĩrĩa makua o ro ũguo.
english: Precious in Yahweh’s sight is the death of his saints.

kikuyu: Bakabukia na Uni, athiritũ ao, maarũgamaga mangʼethanĩire nao magĩtungata.
english: Joel the son of Zichri was their overseer; and Judah the son of Hassenuah was second over the city.

kikuyu: kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini, nĩ Abidani mũrũ wa Gideoni;
english: If it is any unclean animal, of which they do not offer as an offering to Yahweh, then he shall set the animal before the priest;

kikuyu: Andũ magĩtũgũũga kuuma itũũra rĩmwe nginya rĩrĩa rĩngĩ magĩcaria maaĩ, no mationire maaĩ maiganu ma kũnyua, no rĩrĩ, inyuĩ mũtiigana kũnjookerera,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: Seek him who made the Pleiades and Orion, and turns the shadow of death into the morning, and makes the day dark with night; who calls for the waters of the sea, and pours them out on the surface of the earth, Yahweh is his name,

kikuyu: Jehova arĩ hamwe na niĩ; ndingĩĩtigĩra. Mũndũ-rĩ, nĩ atĩa angĩhota kũnjĩka?
english: in pureness, in knowledge, in perseverance, in kindness, in the Holy Spirit, in sincere love,

kikuyu: “ ‘Rũgamagĩrai andũ arĩa akũrũ, mũmatĩĩage; heagai andũ arĩa akũrũ gĩtĩĩo, na mwĩtigagĩre Ngai wanyu. Niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova.
english: “ ‘You shall rise up before the gray head and honor the face of the elderly; and you shall fear your God. I am Yahweh.

kikuyu: Andũ arĩa othe mendaga kũnjũraga maroconorithio na manyiitwo nĩ kĩrigiicano; arĩa othe mendaga nyanangwo marocooka na thuutha maconokete.
english: Let them be disappointed and confounded together who seek after my soul to destroy it. Let them be turned backward and brought to dishonor who delight in my hurt.

kikuyu: Inyuĩ atongoria aya atumumu! Inyuĩ mũcungaga rũmuru, no mũkameria ngamĩĩra.
english: For false christs and false prophets will arise, and they will show great signs and wonders, so as to lead astray, if possible, even the chosen ones.

kikuyu: Ngĩmarehe thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Jehova, ngĩmatoonyia kanyũmba ka ariũ a Hanani mũrũ wa Igidalia, mũndũ wa Ngai. Kanyũmba kau kaariganĩtie na kanyũmba ka anene, karĩa kaarĩ hau igũrũ rĩa nyũmba ya Maaseia mũrũ wa Shalumu, ũrĩa warĩ mũikaria wa mũrango.
english: and I brought them into Yahweh’s house, into the room of the sons of Hanan the son of Igdaliah, the man of God, which was by the room of the princes, which was above the room of Maaseiah the son of Shallum, the keeper of the threshold.

kikuyu: Kaĩ makĩrĩ na haaro-ĩ! Marũmĩrĩire njĩra ya Kaini; ningĩ magetoonyia na ihenya ihĩtia-inĩ rĩa Balamu nĩguo mone uumithio; o na makĩniinwo ũremi-inĩ wa gũũkĩrĩra wathani ta Kora.
english: Woe to them! For they went in the way of Cain, and ran riotously in the error of Balaam for hire, and perished in Korah’s rebellion.

kikuyu: “Gĩkĩ nĩkĩo kĩhurũko gĩakwa nginya tene na tene; gũkũ nĩkuo ngũtũũra njikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene, nĩgũkorwo nĩ niĩ ndĩyendeire;
english: For Yahweh will judge his people and have compassion on his servants.

kikuyu: “O ta ũrĩa matu maraihanĩrĩirie na thĩ, ũguo noguo mĩthiĩre yakwa ĩraihanĩrĩirie na mĩthiĩre yanyu, o na meciiria makwa magakĩra meciiria manyu.
english: “For as the heavens are higher than the earth, so are my ways higher than your ways, and my thoughts than your thoughts.

kikuyu: Endaga Mwathani Ngai waku na ngoro yaku yothe, na muoyo waku wothe, na meciiria maku mothe, na hinya waku wothe.’
english: You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart, with all your soul, with all your mind, and with all your strength.’* This is the first commandment.

kikuyu: Narĩo riiko rĩa kĩgongona-rĩ, nĩ mĩkono ĩna kũraiha na igũrũ, nacio hĩa inya irorete na igũrũ ikoimĩrĩra kuuma hau riiko-inĩ.
english: He measured the length of the building before the separate place which was at its back, and its galleries on the one side and on the other side, one hundred cubits from the inner temple, and the porches of the court,

kikuyu: “ ‘Mũtikanamũkĩre indo cia gũkũũra muoyo wa mũũragani, ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩ gũkua. Ti-itherũ ũcio no nginya ooragwo.
english: “ ‘Moreover you shall take no ransom for the life of a murderer who is guilty of death. He shall surely be put to death.

kikuyu: Nũũ ũngĩnandũra kĩndũ atĩ nĩguo ndĩmũrĩhe? Kĩndũ gĩothe kĩrĩ rungu rwa igũrũ nĩ gĩakwa.
english: Who has first given to me, that I should repay him? Everything under the heavens is mine.

kikuyu: Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro inyuĩ arĩa mũhũũniĩ rĩu-ĩ, nĩgũkorwo nĩmũkahũũta. Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro arĩa mũratheka rĩu-ĩ, nĩgũkorwo nĩmũgacakaya na mũrĩre.
english: Woe to you, you who are full now, for you will be hungry. Woe to you who laugh now, for you will mourn and weep.

kikuyu: Ũyũ nĩguo ũhoro wa Isaaka mũrũ wa Iburahĩmu. Iburahĩmu nĩwe waciarire Isaaka,
english: This is the history of the generations of Isaac, Abraham’s son. Abraham became the father of Isaac.

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũrĩa ũikaraga agitĩirwo nĩ Ũrĩa-ũrĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno arĩhurũkaga kĩĩruru-inĩ kĩa Mwene-Hinya-Wothe.
english: It is a good thing to give thanks to Yahweh, to sing praises to your name, Most High,

kikuyu: Musa akĩnengera Harũni na ariũ ake mbeeca icio ciakũũrĩte andũ, o ta ũrĩa aathĩtwo nĩ kiugo kĩa Jehova.
english: and Moses gave the redemption money to Aaron and to his sons, according to Yahweh’s word, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

kikuyu: Nĩakahonokia o na ũrĩa ũrĩ na ũcuuke, ahonokio nĩ ũndũ wa ũtheru wa moko maku.”
english: He will even deliver him who is not innocent. Yes, he will be delivered through the cleanness of your hands.”

kikuyu: Riiri wa Jehova ũrotũũra nginya tene; Jehova arokenagĩra mawĩra make:
english: Let Yahweh’s glory endure forever. Let Yahweh rejoice in his works.

kikuyu: Wũi, ruo-ĩ, wũi ruo-ĩ! Ndĩrenyogonda nĩ ruo. Wũi, ruo rũnene ngoro-inĩ yakwa-ĩ! Ngoro yakwa nĩĩratumatuuma, ndingĩhota gũkirĩrĩria. Nĩgũkorwo nĩnjiguĩte mũgambo wa karumbeta; nĩnjiguĩte mbugĩrĩrio ya mbaara.
english: It will happen when you say, ‘Why has Yahweh our God done all these things to us?’ Then you shall say to them, ‘Just as you have forsaken me and served foreign gods in your land, so you will serve strangers in a land that is not yours.’

kikuyu: “Tharĩkĩrai bũrũri wa Merathaimu,* mũũkĩrĩre arĩa matũũraga Pekodi. Matengʼeriei, na mũmoorage, mũmaniine biũ,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga. “Ĩkai ũrĩa wothe ndĩmwathĩte.
english: “Go up against the land of Merathaim, even against it, and against the inhabitants of Pekod. Kill and utterly destroy after them,” says Yahweh, “and do according to all that I have commanded you.

kikuyu: Tuonie gũtara matukũ maitũ wega, nĩgeetha tũgĩe na ngoro ya ũũgĩ.
english: So teach us to count our days, that we may gain a heart of wisdom.

kikuyu: Ngoro yakwa nĩĩracakaĩra Moabi o ta kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto, nayo ngoro yakwa ĩgacaĩra Kiri-Heresethu. Rĩrĩa andũ a Moabi maathiĩ kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru makahooe, no kwĩnogia menogagia; hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maathiĩ ihooero-inĩ rĩao kũhooya, no wĩra wa tũhũ marutaga.
english: In the day of your planting, you hedge it in. In the morning, you make your seed blossom, but the harvest flees away in the day of grief and of desperate sorrow.

kikuyu: Mũthenya ũcio, andũ nĩmagooka kũrĩ we moimĩte Ashuri na matũũra manene ma Misiri, na bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ gatagatĩ ka bũrũri wa Misiri na Rũũĩ rwa Farati, na kuuma iria rĩmwe nginya rĩrĩa rĩngĩ, na kuuma kĩrĩma kĩmwe nginya kĩrĩa kĩngĩ.
english: In that day they will come to you from Assyria and the cities of Egypt, and from Egypt even to the River, and from sea to sea, and mountain to mountain.

kikuyu: “Nĩgũkorwo niĩ, Jehova, nĩnyendete ciira wa kĩhooto; nĩthũire ũtunyani na waganu. Nĩ ũndũ wa wĩhokeku wakwa-rĩ, nĩngamarĩha irĩhi rĩao, na ndĩĩkanĩre nao kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa gũtũũra nginya tene.
english: Yahweh has sworn by his right hand, and by the arm of his strength, “Surely I will no more give your grain to be food for your enemies,  Hephzibah means “I delight in her”.  Beulah means “married”

kikuyu: Acio nĩo maatarirwo nĩ Musa na Eleazaru ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai rĩrĩa maatarĩire andũ a Isiraeli werũ-inĩ wa Moabi hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani, mũrĩmo ũyũ wa Jeriko.
english: These are those who were counted by Moses and Eleazar the priest, who counted the children of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho.

kikuyu: Ngĩambĩrĩria kũhunjĩria andũ arĩa maarĩ Dameski, ngĩcooka ngĩhunjĩria andũ a kũu Jerusalemu o na a Judea guothe, na andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ o nao. Ndaahunjagia atĩ nĩmagĩrĩirwo nĩ kwĩrira na magarũrũke kũrĩ Ngai, na moonanie kwĩrira kwao na ũndũ wa ciĩko ciao.
english: Being perplexed how to inquire concerning these things, I asked whether he was willing to go to Jerusalem and there be judged concerning these matters.

kikuyu: Ariũ a Shobali maarĩ: Alivani, na Manahathu, na Ebali, na Shefo, na Onamu.
english: These are the children of Shobal: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho, and Onam.

kikuyu: Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga ũũ: “Nĩngahonokia andũ akwa kuuma mabũrũri ma mwena wa irathĩro na wa ithũĩro.
english: Yahweh of Armies says: “Behold, I will save my people from the east country and from the west country.

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo maũndũ macio mothe nĩmo meekagwo nĩ andũ arĩa maatũũraga bũrũri ũcio mbere yanyu, naguo bũrũri ũcio ũkĩnyiitwo nĩ thaahu.
english: (for the men of the land that were before you had done all these abominations, and the land became defiled),

kikuyu: Nawe nĩũkoiga atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũtharĩkĩra bũrũri ũrĩa wa matũũra matarĩ mairigĩre; nĩngũhithũkĩra andũ marĩ na thayũ na matarekũũa ũndũ, arĩa othe maikaraga matũũra matarĩ mairigĩre, na matarĩ ihingo na mĩgĩĩko.
english: “ ‘ “It will happen in that day, that I will give to Gog a place for burial in Israel, the valley of those who pass through on the east of the sea; and it will stop those who pass through. They will bury Gog and all his multitude there, and they will call it ‘The valley of Hamon Gog’.

kikuyu: “Mwaki nĩwoimire kũu Heshiboni, rũrĩrĩmbĩ rũkiuma itũũra inene rĩa Sihoni. Ũkĩniina itũũra rĩa Ari Moabi, o atũũri a kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru kwa Arinoni.
english: for a fire has gone out of Heshbon, a flame from the city of Sihon. It has devoured Ar of Moab, The lords of the high places of the Arnon.

kikuyu: “No rĩrĩ, nĩngacookia ũgaacĩru wa Elamu matukũ-inĩ marĩa magooka,” ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: ‘But it will happen in the latter days that I will reverse the captivity of Elam,’ says Yahweh.”

kikuyu: Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Jesũ agĩtua itua rĩa gũthiĩ Galili. Agĩkora Filipu, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nũmĩrĩra.”
english: On the next day, he was determined to go out into Galilee, and he found Philip. Jesus said to him, “Follow me.”

kikuyu: Mageekaga maũndũ macio nĩ ũndũ matimenyete Baba o na kana makaamenya.
english: They will do these things† because they have not known the Father nor me.

kikuyu: “ ‘No inyuĩ andũ a nyũmba ya Isiraeli-rĩ, ũũ nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga: Thiĩi mũndũ o mũndũ mũgatungatĩre mĩhianano yanyu! Ti-itherũ thuutha ũcio, nĩmũgathikĩrĩria na mũtigacooka gũthaahia rĩĩtwa rĩakwa itheru na iheo cianyu na mĩhianano yanyu.
english: “ ‘As for you, house of Israel, the Lord Yahweh says: “Go, everyone serve his idols, and hereafter also, if you will not listen to me; but you shall no more profane my holy name with your gifts and with your idols.

kikuyu: Ndionaga thayũ, o na kana ngahoorera; ndionaga ũhurũko, no mĩnyamaro.”
english: I am not at ease, neither am I quiet, neither do I have rest; but trouble comes.”

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũyũ mũthĩĩni aakaĩire Jehova, nake Jehova akĩmũigua, akĩmũhonokia mathĩĩna-inĩ make mothe.
english: This poor man cried, and Yahweh heard him, and saved him out of all his troubles.

kikuyu: Nineve nĩgũtahe, na indo igatunyanwo gũgatigwo ũtheri! Ngoro nĩikuĩte, na maru makaregera, na mĩĩrĩ ĩkainaina, o na andũ othe magathita ithiithi.
english: Yes, they scoff at kings, and princes are a derision to them. They laugh at every stronghold, for they build up an earthen ramp and take it.

kikuyu: Othe makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee ũkĩrĩ Mũrũ wa Ngai?” Nake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩmwamenya nĩ kuuga atĩ nĩ niĩ we.”
english: They all said, “Are you then the Son of God?” He said to them, “You say it, because I am.”

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo aatũũraga Werũ-inĩ wa Parani-rĩ, nyina akĩmwethera mũtumia kuuma Misiri. Kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Iburahĩmu na Abimeleku
english: Uz his firstborn, Buz his brother, Kemuel the father of Aram,

kikuyu: “Rĩrĩa andũ a mabũrũri marĩa tũriganĩtie marĩrehaga indo na ngano ya kwendia mũthenya wa Thabatũ, tũtikamagũrĩra mũthenya ũcio wa Thabatũ o na kana mũthenya ũngĩ o wothe mwamũre. O mwaka wa mũgwanja wakinya tũtirĩrĩmaga mĩgũnda iitũ, na nĩtũrĩĩrekanagĩra mathiirĩ mothe.
english: and if the peoples of the land bring wares or any grain on the Sabbath day to sell, that we would not buy from them on the Sabbath, or on a holy day; and that we would forego the seventh year crops and the exaction of every debt.

kikuyu: Magaatũma gũkire ihooru, gũtuĩke kũndũ kũngʼaru na gũkirĩte ihooru maitho-inĩ makwa; bũrũri ũcio wothe nĩũgathũkangio nĩ ũndũ gũtirĩ mũndũ wakũũrũmbũiya.
english: They have made it a desolation. It mourns to me, being desolate. The whole land is made desolate, because no one cares.

kikuyu: gĩkuũ nĩkũniinwo gĩkaaniinwo nginya tene. Ningĩ Mwathani Jehova nĩakagiria maithori,
english: The mirth of tambourines ceases. The sound of those who rejoice ends. The joy of the harp ceases.

kikuyu: Kũrĩ athamaki-rĩ, gwĩka ũũru nĩ ũndũ ũrĩ magigi, nĩgũkorwo gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene kĩĩhaandaga nĩ ũndũ wa ũthingu.
english: Let a bear robbed of her cubs meet a man, rather than a fool in his folly.

kikuyu: O na rĩu-rĩ, mũira wakwa arĩ igũrũ; ũcio mũnjiirĩrĩri arĩ o igũrũ. * 16:4 Kũinainĩria mũndũ mũtwe kuonanagia kũnyarara mũndũ ũcio, na kũu kwarĩ kũmũruma.
english: to whom alone the land was given, and no stranger passed among them):

kikuyu: Nĩaarutire andũ ake makiuma kũu makenete, akĩruta acio ake athuure makĩanagĩrĩra nĩ gũkena;
english: He brought his people out with joy, his chosen with singing.

kikuyu: “Atĩrĩrĩ, Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli na Mũkũũri wao, o we Jehova-Mwene-Hinya-Wothe, ekuuga atĩrĩ: Nĩ niĩ wa mbere na nĩ niĩ wa kũrigĩrĩria, gũtirĩ Ngai ũngĩ tiga niĩ.
english: This is what Yahweh, the King of Israel, and his Redeemer, Yahweh of Armies, says: “I am the first, and I am the last; and besides me there is no God.

kikuyu: Thĩ kũrĩa kũriku mũno kũrĩ guoko-inĩ gwake, o na tũcũmbĩrĩ twa irĩma no twake.
english: If then you have to judge things pertaining to this life, do you set them to judge who are of no account in the assembly?

kikuyu: Sara akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngai nĩatũmĩte theke, na mũndũ o wothe ũrĩiguaga ũhoro ũcio nĩarĩthekaga hamwe na niĩ.”
english: God said to him in the dream, “Yes, I know that in the integrity of your heart you have done this, and I also withheld you from sinning against me. Therefore I didn’t allow you to touch her.

kikuyu: Mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru ũkaamba hema ciao mariganĩtie na andũ a Juda. Mũtongoria wa andũ a Isakaru nĩ Nethaneli mũrũ wa Zuaru.
english: “Those who encamp next to him shall be the tribe of Issachar. The prince of the children of Issachar shall be Nethanel the son of Zuar.

kikuyu: Nĩngamũminjaminjĩria maaĩ matheru, na inyuĩ nĩmũgathera; nĩ niĩ ngaamũtheria mũthirwo nĩ thaahu wanyu wothe, na ndĩmũtherie kuuma kũrĩ mĩhianano yanyu yothe.
english: I will sprinkle clean water on you, and you will be clean. I will cleanse you from all your filthiness and from all your idols.

kikuyu: Nĩndakwĩrire mĩthiĩre yakwa nawe ũkĩnjĩtĩka; nduta kĩrĩra kĩa watho waku.
english: I declared my ways, and you answered me. Teach me your statutes.

kikuyu: “ ‘Athĩnjĩri-Ngai matikanahikie andũ-a-nja arĩa methaahĩtie na ũmaraya, kana arĩa matiganĩte na athuuri ao, tondũ athĩnjĩri-Ngai nĩ atheru harĩ Ngai wao.
english: “ ‘They shall not marry a woman who is a prostitute, or profane. A priest shall not marry a woman divorced from her husband; for he is holy to his God.

kikuyu: Jehova nĩakaguũria guoko gwake gũtheru harĩ ndũrĩrĩ ciothe, ikuone na maitho mao, nacio ituri ciothe cia thĩ nĩcikoona ũhonokanio wa Ngai witũ.
english: Yet it pleased Yahweh to bruise him. He has caused him to suffer. When you make his soul an offering for sin, he will see his offspring. He will prolong his days and Yahweh’s pleasure will prosper in his hand.

kikuyu: Nake mũtumia ũcio, ona atĩ ndangĩhota kwĩhitha, agĩũka akĩinainaga, akĩĩgũithia magũrũ-inĩ make. Arĩ hau mbere ya andũ othe akĩheana gĩtũmi kĩrĩa gĩatũmĩte amũhutie na ũrĩa aahonirio o ro rĩmwe. Nake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwarĩ ũyũ, gwĩtĩkia gwaku nĩkuo gwatũma ũhone. Thiĩ na thayũ.” Na o hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩaragia, hagĩkinya mũndũ woimĩte mũciĩ kwa Jairũ ũrĩa mũnene wa thunagogi, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mwarĩguo nĩarĩkĩtie gũkua, tiga gũthĩĩnia Mũrutani.”
english: When the woman saw that she was not hidden, she came trembling; and falling down before him declared to him in the presence of all the people the reason why she had touched him, and how she was healed immediately.

kikuyu: Ũthingu nĩguo ũgaatuĩka mũcibi wake, naguo wĩhokeku ũtuĩke mwĩhotoro wake wa njohero.
english: Righteousness will be the belt around his waist, and faithfulness the belt around his waist.

kikuyu: Githĩ Boazu ũcio wee ũkoretwo na ndungata ciake cia airĩtu ti mũndũ wa rũrĩra rwitũ? Ũtukũ ũyũ nĩguo ekũhuha cairi kĩhuhĩro-inĩ.*
english: The name of the man was Elimelech, and the name of his wife Naomi. The names of his two sons were Mahlon and Chilion, Ephrathites of Bethlehem Judah. They came into the country of Moab and lived there.

kikuyu: Handũ ha ũguo-rĩ: “Thũ yaku ĩngĩkorwo ĩhũtiĩ-rĩ, mĩhe irio; ĩngĩkorwo nĩĩnyootiĩ-rĩ, mĩhe gĩa kũnyua. Gwĩka ũguo-rĩ, nĩkũmĩigĩrĩra makara ma mwaki mũtwe.”
english: Therefore “If your enemy is hungry, feed him. If he is thirsty, give him a drink; for in doing so, you will heap coals of fire on his head.”*

kikuyu: Mũthamaki nake agĩtũma Jehudi agĩĩre ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo, nake Jehudi akĩrĩrehe kuuma kanyũmba-inĩ ka Elishama, ũrĩa mwandĩki, akĩrĩthomera mũthamaki na anene acio othe marũgamĩte hau harĩ mũthamaki.
english: So the king sent Jehudi to get the scroll, and he took it out of the room of Elishama the scribe. Jehudi read it in the hearing of the king, and in the hearing of all the princes who stood beside the king.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ayahudi arĩa maatũũraga hakuhĩ na thũ icio magĩũka, magĩtwĩra maita ikũmi atĩrĩ, “O kũrĩa mũngĩũrĩra-rĩ, nĩmegũtũtharĩkĩra.”
english: Next to him, Shallum the son of Hallohesh, the ruler of half the district of Jerusalem, he and his daughters made repairs.

kikuyu: Mwathani arĩ guoko-inĩ gwaku kwa ũrĩo; * 110:1 Itĩ cia ũnene cia tene ciakoragwo handũ hatũũgĩru harĩa haambatagwo na ngathĩ.
english: He has given food to those who fear him. He always remembers his covenant.

kikuyu: Anyũrũrania matũmaga itũũra inene rĩrĩmbũke ta mwaki, no andũ oogĩ nĩkũniina maniinaga marakara.
english: Remove far from me falsehood and lies. Give me neither poverty nor riches. Feed me with the food that is needful for me,

kikuyu: Ndaamandĩkĩire maũndũ maingĩ watho-inĩ wakwa, no makĩmatua taarĩ maũndũ mageni.
english: I wrote for him the many things of my law, but they were regarded as a strange thing.

kikuyu: Guoko kwa Mwathani kwarĩ hamwe nao; na andũ aingĩ magĩĩtĩkia makĩgarũrũkĩra Mwathani.
english: The hand of the Lord was with them, and a great number believed and turned to the Lord.

kikuyu: o na atumia amwe a arĩa maarutĩtwo ngoma thũku na arĩa maahonetio mĩrimũ: nao nĩ Mariamu (ũrĩa wetagwo Mũmagidali), nĩwe warutĩtwo ndaimono mũgwanja;
english: and certain women who had been healed of evil spirits and infirmities: Mary who was called Magdalene, from whom seven demons had gone out;

kikuyu: “Githĩ bũrũri ndũkainaina nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo, na arĩa othe matũũraga kuo macakae? Bũrũri wothe nĩkũiyũra ũkaiyũra ta Rũũĩ rwa Nili, ũhũũrane, na ũcooke ũhũũcũke ta rũũĩ rwa Misiri.”
english: Therefore at that time certain Chaldeans came near, and brought accusation against the Jews.

kikuyu: Namũtikeĩĩrenangorocianyuatĩrĩ, ‘IthewitũnĩIburahĩmu.’ Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, Ngai no atũme mahiga maya matuĩke ciana cia Iburahĩmu.
english: They, having heard the king, went their way; and behold, the star, which they saw in the east, went before them until it came and stood over where the young child was.

kikuyu: Mũnene ũtarĩ na ũtaũku nĩahinyagĩrĩria andũ mũno, no mũndũ ũrĩa ũthũire uumithio ũtagĩrĩire nĩagakenera matukũ maingĩ ma muoyo wake.
english: When the wicked increase, sin increases; but the righteous will see their downfall.

kikuyu: na inyuothe mũngĩthiĩ mwĩohete indo cia mbaara, mũringe Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani mũrĩ mbere ya Jehova o nginya rĩrĩa akaingata thũ ciake ciume mbere yake,
english: Eleazar the priest said to the men of war who went to the battle, “This is the statute of the law which Yahweh has commanded Moses.

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũcio na mũmũgũri magaatara ihinda rĩrĩa rĩthiru kuuma mwaka ũrĩa eyendirie nginya rĩrĩa Mwaka wa Jubilii ũgaakinya. Thogora wa kũrekererio gwake ũkaaringana na irĩhi rĩa mũndũ wa mũcaara thĩinĩ wa mĩaka ĩyo.
english: He shall reckon with him who bought him from the year that he sold himself to him to the Year of Jubilee. The price of his sale shall be according to the number of years; he shall be with him according to the time of a hired servant.

kikuyu: Aranagĩriai mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ na ciugo cia thaburi, na nyĩmbo cia kũinĩra Ngai, o na nyĩmbo cia kũguna maroho. Inagai na mũtungage na nyĩmbo ngoro-inĩ cianyu nĩ ũndũ wa Mwathani,
english: speaking to one another in psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; singing and making melody in your heart to the Lord;

kikuyu: “Andũ arĩa marĩ na ũtaũku maroiga atĩrĩ, nao andũ acio oogĩ maiguĩte ngĩaria manjĩĩrĩte atĩrĩ,
english: Men of understanding will tell me, yes, every wise man who hears me:

kikuyu: Mũndũ angĩgakũũra gĩcunjĩ gĩake gĩa ikũmi, no nginya akongerera gĩcunjĩ kĩngĩ gĩa ithano harĩ thogora ũrĩa ũtuĩtwo.
english: If a man redeems anything of his tithe, he shall add a fifth part to it.

kikuyu: Matũũra macio matandatũ mũkaaheana nĩmo magaatuĩka matũũra manyu manene ma kũũrĩrwo.
english: Moses commanded the children of Israel, saying, “This is the land which you shall inherit by lot, which Yahweh has commanded to give to the nine tribes, and to the half-tribe;

kikuyu: na Firigia, na Pamufilia, na Misiri, na mĩena ya Libia ĩrĩa ĩrĩ gũkuhĩ na Kurene, na ageni a kuuma Roma,
english: Phrygia, Pamphylia, Egypt, the parts of Libya around Cyrene, visitors from Rome, both Jews and proselytes,

kikuyu: “Tiira maitho wĩrorere mĩena yothe: One ũrĩa andũ othe monganĩte magooka harĩwe, nao ariũ aku makoima kũndũ kũraya, nao airĩtu aku magooka makuuĩtwo na moko.
english: “Lift up your eyes all around, and see: they all gather themselves together. They come to you. Your sons will come from far away, and your daughters will be carried in arms.

kikuyu: Ndigakũiguĩra tha kana ngũcaaĩre; nĩngakũrĩha kũringana na mĩthiĩre yaku na mĩtugo yaku ĩrĩ magigi gatagatĩ-inĩ kanyu. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũkamenya atĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova ndĩrahũũrana.
english: He said to me, “Go in, and see the wicked abominations that they do here.”

kikuyu: “Mũrungu nĩatũgĩrĩtio nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoti wake. Nũũ mũrutani take?
english: Out of the north comes golden splendor. With God is awesome majesty.

kikuyu: Ciana ciao igaikaraga o ta matukũ-inĩ marĩa ma tene, nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩao gĩtũũre kĩrũmĩte wega mbere yakwa; nĩngaherithia arĩa othe mamahinyagĩrĩria.
english: Their children also will be as before, and their congregation will be established before me. I will punish all who oppress them.

kikuyu: Athĩĩni mũrĩ nao hĩndĩ ciothe, no niĩ mũtirĩkoragwo na niĩ hĩndĩ ciothe.”
english: For you always have the poor with you, but you don’t always have me.”

kikuyu: Wĩhia wao wa ũiti wa thakame, ũcio itarĩ ndaamarekera-rĩ, nĩngamarekera.” Jehova atũũraga Zayuni!
english: I will cleanse their blood that I have not cleansed, for Yahweh dwells in Zion.”

kikuyu: Wee ũrĩ mwarĩ wa nyũkwa kũna, ũrĩa wanyararire mũthuuriwe na ciana ciake; na ũrĩ wa nyina kũna na aarĩ a maitũguo, arĩa maanyararire athuuri ao na ciana ciao. Maitũguo aarĩ Mũhiti, nake thoguo aarĩ Mũamori.
english: You are the daughter of your mother, who loathes her husband and her children; and you are the sister of your sisters, who loathed their husbands and their children. Your mother was a Hittite, and your father an Amorite.

kikuyu: Wee Jehova nĩngũkũgooca, ngũgooce gatagatĩ-inĩ ka ndũrĩrĩ; nĩngũkũinĩra ndĩ gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ.
english: I will give thanks to you, Yahweh, among the nations. I will sing praises to you among the peoples.

kikuyu: Ũyũ nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa Musa aaheete nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase, ũguo nĩ kuuga nuthu ya nyũmba ya njiaro cia Manase, kũringana na ũrĩa mbarĩ ciao ciatariĩ: Nĩ bũrũri ũrĩa uumĩte o Mahanaimu, hamwe na Bashani guothe, kũrĩa guothe gwathanagwo nĩ Ogu mũthamaki wa Bashani, o na matũũra mothe ma Jairu kũu Bashani, namo mothe nĩ matũũra
english: Moses gave an inheritance to the half-tribe of Manasseh. It was for the half-tribe of the children of Manasseh according to their families.

kikuyu: Nĩakaigĩrĩra guoko gwake igũrũ rĩa mũtwe wako, na agathĩnje gatuĩke iruta rĩa kũhoroherio mehia, agathĩnjĩre harĩa iruta rĩa njino rĩthĩnjagĩrwo. Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai nĩakoya thakameĩmweyairutarĩurĩamehianakĩaragĩake, nayoamĩhakehĩaciakĩgongonakĩairutarĩanjino, nayo thakame ĩyo ĩngĩ amĩite gĩtina-inĩ gĩa kĩgongona.
english: He shall lay his hand on the head of the sin offering, and kill it for a sin offering in the place where they kill the burnt offering.

kikuyu: Aũcomoraga kuuma ngʼongʼo wake, mũtheece ũcio mũkengu akaũcomora kuuma ini-inĩ rĩake. Imakania nĩikamũkorerera;
english: He draws it out, and it comes out of his body. Yes, the glittering point comes out of his liver. Terrors are on him.

kikuyu: Alawii nĩo marĩrutaga wĩra Hema-inĩ-ya-Gũtũnganwo na nĩo marĩcookagĩrĩrwo nĩ mahĩtia marĩa meekĩirwo hau. Ũyũ nĩ watho wa gũtũũrio nĩ njiaro iria igooka. Matikagĩa na igai thĩinĩ wa andũ a Isiraeli.
english: But the Levites shall do the service of the Tent of Meeting, and they shall bear their iniquity. It shall be a statute forever throughout your generations. Among the children of Israel, they shall have no inheritance.

kikuyu: “ ‘Gĩthaka kĩrĩa gĩgaatuĩka kĩa mũnene ũcio gĩkaahakana mbarĩ cierĩ na rũgongo rũrĩa rwamũrĩirwo Jehova, hamwe na gĩthaka gĩa itũũra rĩrĩa inene. Kuuma mwena wa ithũĩro gĩgaatam- bũrũka kĩrorete mwena wa ithũĩro, na kuuma mwena wa irathĩro gĩtambũrũke kĩrorete mwena wa irathĩro, naguo ũraihu wakĩo ũgaakĩĩgama kuuma mũhaka wa ithũĩro nginya wa irathĩro, gĩtwaranĩte na mĩhaka ya magai ma Benjamini na Juda.
english: “ ‘ “What is for the prince shall be on the one side and on the other side of the holy allotment and of the possession of the city, in front of the holy allotment and in front of the possession of the city, on the west side westward, and on the east side eastward, and in length corresponding to one of the portions, from the west border to the east border.

kikuyu: Mũrooria atĩrĩ, ‘Rĩu nyũmba ya mũndũ ũrĩa mũnene ĩkĩrĩ ha, na hema ĩrĩa andũ aaganu maratũũraga-rĩ, ĩkĩrĩ ha?’
english: For you say, ‘Where is the house of the prince? Where is the tent in which the wicked lived?’

kikuyu: O na mũrata wakwa wa hakuhĩ, ũrĩa ndĩrehokete, o ũrĩa tũrĩĩanagĩra irio nake nĩangarũrũkĩte. No rĩrĩ, Wee Jehova, njiguĩra tha; njarahũra, nĩguo ndĩĩrĩhĩrie harĩo.
english: I will ask God, my rock, “Why have you forgotten me? Why do I go mourning because of the oppression of the enemy?”

kikuyu: Sara agĩĩtigĩra mũno, nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩheenania, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndinatheka.” Nowe Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ma nĩwatheka.” Iburahĩmu Gũthaithanĩrĩra Sodomu Rĩrĩa andũ acio mookĩrire mathiĩ-rĩ, makĩerekera na Sodomu,† nake Iburahĩmu agĩtwarana nao amoimagarie.
english: God said to Abraham, “As for Sarai your wife, you shall not call her name Sarai, but her name shall be Sarah.

kikuyu: na magakinya Diboni, na Nebo, na Bethi-Dibilathaimu,
english: on Dibon, on Nebo, on Beth Diblathaim,

kikuyu: Ĩra Shemaia ũcio Mũnehelami atĩrĩ,
english: Concerning Shemaiah the Nehelamite you shall speak, saying,

kikuyu: Nĩahinyĩrĩirio na agĩthĩĩnio, nowe ndaatumũrire kanua gake; aakirire ki o ta ũrĩa gatũrũme gakiraga gagĩthiĩ gũthĩnjwo, na o ta ũrĩa ngʼondu ĩkiraga ki ĩrĩ mbere ya mũmĩenji guoya, noguo o nake ataatumũrire kanua gake.
english: You husbands, in the same way, live with your wives according to knowledge, giving honor to the woman as to the weaker vessel, as also being joint heirs of the grace of life, that your prayers may not be hindered.

kikuyu: Andũ arĩa maitaga thakame nĩmathũire mũndũ mwĩhokeku, no andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru macaragia ũrĩa mangĩtiirĩrĩra muoyo wake.
english: “Don’t slander a servant to his master, lest he curse you, and you be held guilty.

kikuyu: Ndoigire atĩrĩ, “Ndĩĩmenyagĩrĩra mĩthiĩre yakwa, ndĩrigagĩrĩrie ndikehie na rũrĩmĩ rwakwa;
english: I waited patiently for Yahweh. He turned to me, and heard my cry.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero akĩrũgama hamwe na arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe, akĩanĩrĩra na akĩarĩria gĩkundi kĩu kĩa andũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ andũ aitũ Ayahudi o na inyuĩ inyuothe mũtũũraga Jerusalemu, rekei ndĩmũtaarĩrie ũhoro ũyũ; thikĩrĩriai wega ũrĩa nguuga.
english: But Peter, standing up with the eleven, lifted up his voice and spoke out to them, “You men of Judea and all you who dwell at Jerusalem, let this be known to you, and listen to my words.

kikuyu: Mũtugo wa gũkoma hanini, gũcooka toro hanini, gũkũnja moko hanini ũhurũke;
english: a little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to sleep,

kikuyu: Hamwe na ariũ arĩa eerĩ a Jusufu arĩa aaciarĩire Misiri, andũ a nyũmba ya Jakubu arĩa maathiire Misiri maarĩ mĩrongo mũgwanja. Nake Jakubu agĩtũma Juda athiĩ mbere yake kũrĩ Jusufu nĩgeetha athĩrĩrwo njĩra ya gũthiĩ Gosheni. Rĩrĩa maakinyire bũrũri wa Gosheni,
english: The sons of Joseph, who were born to him in Egypt, were two souls. All the souls of the house of Jacob, who came into Egypt, were seventy.

kikuyu: Tondũ nĩ niĩ ndĩmwĩhĩirie, nĩngũkirĩrĩria mangʼũrĩ ma Jehova nginya rĩrĩa we akaanjiirĩrĩra, na onanie kĩhooto gĩakwa. Nĩakanduta nduma-inĩ, andehe ũtheri-inĩ, na niĩ nĩngeyonera ũthingu wake.
english: I will bear the indignation of Yahweh, because I have sinned against him, until he pleads my case and executes judgment for me. He will bring me out to the light. I will see his righteousness.

kikuyu: Niĩ ndĩ ndungata yaku; he gũkũũrana maũndũ, nĩguo hote gũtaũkĩrwo nĩ kĩrĩra gĩaku.
english: I am your servant. Give me understanding, that I may know your testimonies.

kikuyu: Hihi nĩndamũhatĩrĩirie na ũndũ wa mũndũ o na ũmwe wa arĩa ndamũtũmĩire?
english: Now I beg you, brothers, look out for those who are causing the divisions and occasions of stumbling, contrary to the doctrine which you learned, and turn away from them.

kikuyu: Kũrigania nake, Hanania mũrũ wa Shelemia, na Hanuni mũriũ wa gatandatũ wa Zalafu, nĩo maacookereirie gĩcunjĩ kĩu kĩngĩ. Kũrigania nao, Meshulamu mũrũ wa Berekia agĩcookereria rũthingo kũngʼethera harĩa aikaraga.
english: After him, Hananiah the son of Shelemiah, and Hanun, the sixth son of Zalaph, repaired another portion. After him, Meshullam the son of Berechiah made repairs across from his room.

kikuyu: O kũrĩa guothe Roho aacierekagĩria, nokuo ciathiiaga, namo magũrũ macio magookĩra magatwarana nacio, tondũ roho wa ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo warĩ thĩinĩ wa magũrũ macio.
english: Wherever the spirit was to go, they went. The spirit was to go there. The wheels were lifted up beside them; for the spirit of the living creature was in the wheels.

kikuyu: Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe, Ngai wa Isiraeli, ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Ndĩ hakuhĩ kũherithia Amoni ngai ya Thebesi, na Firaũni, na bũrũri wa Misiri na ngai ciakuo, na athamaki akuo, na arĩa othe mehokaga Firaũni.
english: Yahweh of Armies, the God of Israel, says: “Behold, I will punish Amon of No, and Pharaoh, and Egypt, with her gods and her kings, even Pharaoh, and those who trust in him.

kikuyu: Samusoni agĩikũrũka Timina marĩ hamwe na ithe na nyina. Na rĩrĩa makuhĩrĩirie mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ ya Timina-rĩ, o rĩmwe kĩana kĩa mũrũũthi† gĩgĩũka na kũrĩ we kĩmũraramĩire.
english: Then Samson went down to Timnah with his father and his mother, and came to the vineyards of Timnah; and behold, a young lion roared at him.

kikuyu: Menyerera muoyo wakwa kũringana na wendo waku, na ndĩathĩkagĩra kĩrĩra gĩa kanua gaku. Gwĩtĩkia Watho wa Jehova
english: Preserve my life according to your loving kindness, so I will obey the statutes of your mouth. LAMEDH

kikuyu: Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ mũtathomete ũrĩa Daudi eekire, rĩrĩa we na arĩa maarĩ nake maarĩ ahũtu?
english: Jesus, answering them, said, “Haven’t you read what David did when he was hungry, he and those who were with him,

kikuyu: Githĩ ti we wĩraga athamaki atĩrĩ, ‘Inyuĩ mũtirĩ kĩene,’ na akeera arĩa marĩ igweta atĩrĩ, ‘Inyuĩ mũrĩ aaganu,’
english: who says to a king, ‘Vile!’ or to nobles, ‘Wicked!’?

kikuyu: Makĩrutĩra ndaimono aanake na airĩtu ao marĩ magongona.
english: Yes, they sacrificed their sons and their daughters to demons.

kikuyu: nĩguo o na ithuĩ arĩa twarĩ a mbere kwĩhoka Kristũ, tũtuĩke a kũgoocithia riiri wa Ngai.
english: to the end that we should be to the praise of his glory, we who had before hoped in Christ.

kikuyu: Ndĩrarĩra nĩ ũndũ wanyu, o ta ũrĩa Jazeri arĩraga, inyuĩ mĩthabibũ ya Sibima. Honge cianyu itambũrũkĩte igakinya iria-inĩ; itambũrũkĩte nginya iria-inĩ rĩa Jazeri. Mũniinani nĩagũĩrĩire matunda maku marĩa meeru, o na akagwĩra thabibũ.
english: With more than the weeping of Jazer I will weep for you, vine of Sibmah. Your branches passed over the sea. They reached even to the sea of Jazer. The destroyer has fallen on your summer fruits and on your vintage.

kikuyu: Ariũ a andũ arĩa makũhinyagĩrĩria nĩmagooka harĩwe makũinamĩrĩre; na arĩa othe makũmenete, mainamĩrĩre magũrũ-inĩ maku, nao magwĩtage Itũũra-Inene-rĩa-Jehova, na Zayuni itũũra rĩa Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli.
english: The sons of those who afflicted you will come bowing to you; and all those who despised you will bow themselves down at the soles of your feet. They will call you Yahweh’s City, the Zion of the Holy One of Israel.

kikuyu: Jesũ Gũtuĩrwo kwambwo Mũtĩ-Igũrũ
english: 1 So Pilate then took Jesus and flogged him.

kikuyu: Makaahĩnganaga makĩũra o ta andũ maroorĩra rũhiũ rwa njora o na gũtarĩ mũndũ ũmaingatithĩtie.
english: They will stumble over one another, as it were before the sword, when no one pursues. You will have no power to stand before your enemies.

kikuyu: Ũgaatuĩka ta mũndũ akĩũrĩra mũrũũthi, agatũngana na nduba, kana atoonye nyũmba yake, nake aigĩrĩra guoko gwake rũthingo-inĩ, arũmwo nĩ nyoka.
english: As if a man fled from a lion, and a bear met him; or he went into the house and leaned his hand on the wall, and a snake bit him.

kikuyu: Hema ciao na ndũũru ciao cia mbũri nĩigatahwo; ciandarũa ciao nĩigakuuo, hamwe na indo ciao ciothe, na ngamĩĩra ciao ciothe. Andũ nĩmakanĩrĩra, mameere atĩrĩ, ‘Kĩmako kĩnene kiumanĩte na mĩena yothe!’
english: They will take their tents and their flocks. they will carry away for themselves their curtains, all their vessels, and their camels; and they will cry to them, ‘Terror on every side!’

kikuyu: Nĩonire mũndũ ũmwe wao akĩnyariirwo nĩ mũndũ wa Misiri. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ kũmũũrĩria na akĩmũrĩhĩria na ũndũ wa kũũraga mũndũ ũcio Mũmisiri.
english: Seeing one of them suffer wrong, he defended him and avenged him who was oppressed, striking the Egyptian.

kikuyu: ya Salai, aarĩ Kalai; ya Amoku, aarĩ Eberi;
english: of Sallai, Kallai; of Amok, Eber;

kikuyu: Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ ũhoro ũkoniĩ andũ aya: “Nĩmendete kũũrũũra mũno; nĩmaregete kũgirĩrĩria magũrũ mao. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nake Jehova ndangĩmetĩkĩra; rĩu nĩekũririkana waganu wao, na amaherithie nĩ ũndũ wa mehia mao.” Ningĩ Jehova akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Tiga kũhoera andũ aya atĩ nĩguo mone wega.
english: Woe is me, my mother, that you have borne me, a man of strife, and a man of contention to the whole earth! I have not lent, neither have men lent to me; yet every one of them curses me.

kikuyu: na gategwa kamwe, na ndũrũme ĩmwe, na gatũrũme kamwe ka mwaka ũmwe, Nĩ ũndũ wa iruta rĩa njino;
english: a basket of unleavened bread, cakes of fine flour mixed with oil, and unleavened wafers anointed with oil with their meal offering and their drink offerings.

kikuyu: Magathĩĩnĩka, tondũ makoretwo marĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro; no maakinya ho magakora hatirĩ kĩndũ.
english: In famine he will redeem you from death; in war, from the power of the sword.

kikuyu: Meere atĩrĩ, ‘Niĩ ndĩ kĩmenyithia harĩ inyuĩ.’ “O ta ũguo niĩ njĩkĩte, noguo o nao mageekwo. Nĩmagatwarwo bũrũri wa kũngĩ marĩ atahe.
english: “Say, ‘I am your sign. As I have done, so will it be done to them. They will go into exile, into captivity.

kikuyu: Matũũra marĩa maarĩ mairigĩre na hinya maarĩ Zidimu, na Zeri, na Hamathu, na Rakathu, na Kinerethu,
english: The fortified cities were Ziddim, Zer, Hammath, Rakkath, Chinnereth,

kikuyu: Wokire kũhonokia andũ aku, na ũhonokie ũrĩa waku mũitĩrĩrie maguta. Wahehenjire kĩongo kĩa nyũmba ya waganu, ũkĩmĩtharia nginya itina-inĩ ciayo.
english: You went out for the salvation of your people, for the salvation of your anointed. You crushed the head of the land of wickedness. You stripped them head to foot. Selah.

kikuyu: Thuutha wa mĩthenya mĩingĩ gũthira, Ayahudi magĩcookania ndundu mamũũrage,
english: When many days were fulfilled, the Jews conspired together to kill him,

kikuyu: “ ‘No rĩrĩ, mũndũangĩkorwoatarĩ narũmena, naorĩmwe athinĩkaniemũndũũngĩkanaamũikĩrie kĩndũ atekwenda,
english: “ ‘But if he shoved him suddenly without hostility, or hurled on him anything without lying in wait,

kikuyu: Nowe Petero agĩthiĩ na mbere kũringaringa mũrango, na rĩrĩa maahingũrire makĩona nĩwe, makĩgega.
english: Paul stood up, and gesturing with his hand said, “Men of Israel, and you who fear God, listen.

kikuyu: “ ‘No kũngĩkorwo no mũndũ ũmwe wĩhĩtie atekwenda, no nginya arehe kaharika ka mwaka ũmwe ka igongona rĩa kũhoroherio mehia.
english: “How long shall I bear with this evil congregation that complain against me? I have heard the complaints of the children of Israel, which they complain against me.

kikuyu: Jesũ Gũitĩrĩrio Maguta arĩ Bethania Na rĩrĩ, gwatigaire o mĩthenya ĩĩrĩ nĩguo kũgĩe na Gĩathĩ kĩa Bathaka na kĩa Mĩgate ĩtarĩ Mĩĩkĩre Ndawa ya Kũimbia,* nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a watho nĩmacaragia ũrĩa mangĩnyiitithia Jesũ na njĩra ya wara nĩguo mamũũrage.
english: 1 It was now two days before the Passover and the Feast of Unleavened Bread, and the chief priests and the scribes sought how they might seize him by deception and kill him.

kikuyu: nĩ ũndũ korwo ndĩ mwara na kũgaathĩrĩria, Mũnyũũmbi no anjeherie narua.
english: For I don’t know how to give flattering titles, or else my Maker would soon take me away.

kikuyu: Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wakũrorire, agĩkũiguĩra tha, kana agĩgũcaaĩra o kũigana nĩguo agwĩke ũndũ o na ũmwe wa macio. No rĩrĩ, wateirwo na kũu werũ-inĩ, nĩ ũndũ wamenirwo o mũthenya o ro ũcio waciarirwo.
english: that I may take the house of Israel in their own heart, because they are all estranged from me through their idols.” ’

kikuyu: Gwĩtigĩra Jehova nĩkuo kũheaga mũndũ ũũgĩ, nakuo kwĩnyiihia gũtongoragia gĩtĩĩo.
english: The fear of Yahweh teaches wisdom. Before honor is humility.

kikuyu: Enoku, ũrĩa wa rũciaro rwa mũgwanja kuuma harĩ Adamu, nĩarathire ũhoro ũkoniĩ andũ acio akiuga ũũ: “Atĩrĩrĩ, Mwathani nĩarooka arĩ na andũ ake arĩa atheru ngiri na ngiri
english: About these also Enoch, the seventh from Adam, prophesied, saying, “Behold,§ the Lord came with ten thousands of his holy ones,

kikuyu: Inyuĩ mũtũũraga Lakishi,† ngaari cianyu cia ita ciohererei mbarathi. Nĩ inyuĩ mwatoonyirie Mwarĩ wa Zayuni mehia-inĩ, nĩgũkorwo ũremi wa Isiraeli woimanire na inyuĩ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩmũkahe Moreshethu-Gathu iheo cia kuuganĩra ũhoro. Itũũra rĩa Akizibu no rĩa kũheenereria athamaki a Isiraeli.
english: Harness the chariot to the swift steed, inhabitant of Lachish. She was the beginning of sin to the daughter of Zion; for the transgressions of Israel were found in you.

kikuyu: “O na akorwo nĩwatiganĩirio na ũkĩmenwo, na gũkĩaga mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩtuĩkanĩria gwaku-rĩ, nĩngatũma ũtũũre ũrĩ mũtĩĩku nginya tene, na ũrĩ gĩkeno kĩa njiarwa ciothe.
english: “Whereas you have been forsaken and hated, so that no one passed through you, I will make you an eternal excellency, a joy of many generations.

kikuyu: na Mizipe, na Kefira, na Moza,
english: Mizpeh, Chephirah, Mozah,

kikuyu: Efiraimu eganaga, akoiga atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndĩ mũtongu mũno; niĩ nĩnduĩkĩte gĩtonga. No o na ndĩ na ũtonga ũcio wothe, matingĩona waganu kana wĩhia o na ũrĩkũ thĩinĩ wakwa.”
english: I will meet them like a bear that is bereaved of her cubs, and will tear the covering of their heart. There I will devour them like a lioness. The wild animal will tear them.

kikuyu: Tũnyũmba tũu twa mĩena-inĩ twakĩtwo ngoroba ithatũ, kamwe gagakwo karĩ igũrũ wa karĩa kangĩ, o ngoroba tũnyũmba mĩrongo ĩtatũ. Nĩ haarĩ na mĩgamba yohanĩtio gũthiũrũrũkĩria rũthingo rwa hekarũ, ya gũtiirĩrĩra tũnyũmba twa mĩena-inĩ; nĩ ũndũ ũcio mĩgamba ĩyo ndĩatoonyetio rũthingo-inĩ rũu rwa hekarũ.
english: The side rooms were in three stories, one over another, and thirty in each story. They entered into the wall which belonged to the house for the side rooms all around, that they might be supported and not penetrate the wall of the house.

kikuyu: Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Hatirĩ bata wa mathiĩ. Mahei gĩa kũrĩa inyuĩ ene.” Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Haha tũrĩ na mĩgate ĩtano tu na thamaki igĩrĩ.”
english: But Jesus said to them, “They don’t need to go away. You give them something to eat.”

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũnabii Jeremia akĩĩra Hanania ũcio mũnabii atĩrĩ, “Hanania, ta thikĩrĩria! Jehova ndagũtũmĩte, no wee-rĩ, nĩũringĩrĩirie rũrĩrĩ rũrũ rwĩhoke ũhoro wa maheeni. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: ‘Ndĩ hakuhĩ gũkweheria thĩ. Mwaka-inĩ o ro ũyũ nĩũgũkua, tondũ nĩũhunjĩtie ũremi wa gũũkĩrĩra Jehova.’ ”
english: Then the prophet Jeremiah said to Hananiah the prophet, “Listen, Hananiah! Yahweh has not sent you, but you make this people trust in a lie.

kikuyu: Mũthenya wa gĩathĩ kĩa mũthamaki witũ-rĩ, we na anene ake manyuuaga ndibei makarĩĩo, nake akanyiitana moko na arĩa manyũrũranagia.
english: On the day of our king, the princes made themselves sick with the heat of wine. He joined his hand with mockers.

kikuyu: O mũthenya ngũgoocaga maita mũgwanja nĩ ũndũ wa mawatho maku ma ũthingu. Arĩa mendete watho waku nĩ marĩ thayũ mũingĩ, na gũtirĩ kĩndũ kĩngĩtũma mahĩngwo.
english: Seven times a day, I praise you, because of your righteous ordinances.

kikuyu: “ ‘Nĩgũkorwo ngoro cia andũ aya nĩ ngingitaru; matũ mao matiiguaga, na nĩmahingĩte maitho mao. Tondũ maahota kuona na maitho mao, na maigue na matũ mao, o na ngoro ciao igĩe na ũmenyo, manjookerere, na niĩ ndĩmahonie.’ No kũrathimwo nĩ maitho manyu tondũ nĩmoonaga, na matũ manyu tondũ nĩmaiguaga.
english: for this people’s heart has grown callous, their ears are dull of hearing, and they have closed their eyes; or else perhaps they might perceive with their eyes, hear with their ears, understand with their heart, and would turn again, and I would heal them.’*

kikuyu: Jehova nĩ mwega, nĩ kĩĩhitho hĩndĩ ya thĩĩna. Arĩa mamwĩhokete-rĩ, nĩamamenyagĩrĩra,
english: It is decreed: she is uncovered, she is carried away; and her servants moan as with the voice of doves, beating on their breasts.

kikuyu: Wee Ngai, ngoro yakwa nĩĩkindĩirie; nĩkũina ngũina, ngũgooce na rwĩmbo na muoyo wakwa wothe.
english: My heart is steadfast, God. I will sing and I will make music with my soul.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkaagĩa na thĩĩna na mĩnyamaro kũrĩ andũ othe arĩa mekaga ũũru; mbere kũrĩ Ayahudi, na thuutha kũrĩ andũ-a- Ndũrĩrĩ; 10no riiri, na gĩtĩĩo, na thayũ ikaaheo mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa wĩkaga wega: mbere kũrĩ Ayahudi, na thuutha kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ.
english: oppression, and anguish on every soul of man who does evil, to the Jew first, and also to the Greek.

kikuyu: “ ‘Ningĩ mũkĩringa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani na mũgĩkinya Jeriko. Nao andũ a Jeriko makĩrũa na inyuĩ, o ta ũrĩa Aamori, na Aperizi, na Akaanani, na Ahiti, na Agirigashi, na Ahivi, na Ajebusi o nao nĩmarũire na inyuĩ, no niĩ ngĩmaneana moko-inĩ manyu.
english: “ ‘You went over the Jordan, and came to Jericho. The men of Jericho fought against you, the Amorite, the Perizzite, the Canaanite, the Hittite, the Girgashite, the Hivite, and the Jebusite; and I delivered them into your hand.

kikuyu: Makaarigiicwo mĩigua-inĩ na marĩĩo nĩ ndibei yao; nao magaacinwo ta maragara momũ. Nĩ harĩ ũmwe wĩyumĩrĩtie thĩinĩ waku wee Nineve, ũrĩa ũthugundaga ũũru wa gũũkĩrĩra Jehova, na akaheanaga irĩra cia waganu.
english: For entangled like thorns, and drunken as with their drink, they are consumed utterly like dry stubble.

kikuyu: o na kiugo gĩake gĩtitũũraga thĩinĩ wanyu, tondũ mũtiĩtĩkĩtie ũrĩa aatũmire.
english: You don’t have his word living in you, because you don’t believe him whom he sent.

kikuyu: Mũtigũkĩona atĩ wĩtĩkio wake nĩ warutire wĩra hamwe na ciĩko ciake, naguo wĩtĩkio wake ũgĩtuuo mũiganĩru kũna nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko icio ciake.
english: You see that faith worked with his works, and by works faith was perfected.

kikuyu: Maitho maku nĩmakeyonera mũthamaki arĩ na riiri wake wothe, na wĩrorere bũrũri waramĩte, ũgatambũrũka kũraya ma.
english: He has cast the lot for them, and his hand has divided it to them with a measuring line. They shall possess it forever.  literally, lilith, which could also be a night demon or night monster

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo, andũ othe nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ Jehova nĩ niĩ njomorete rũhiũ rwakwa rwa njora kuuma njora-inĩ; rũtigacookio rĩngĩ njora-inĩ.’
english: This was not as we had expected, but first they gave their own selves to the Lord, and to us through the will of God.

kikuyu: Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Mwĩcũraniei rĩu! Ĩtai atumia arĩa marĩraga makĩgirĩkaga moke;* tũmanĩrai atumia arĩa oogĩ mũno thĩinĩ wao moke.
english: Did I take advantage of you by anyone of those whom I have sent to you?

kikuyu: “Kũrĩ maũndũ matatũ mangegagia mũno makĩria, o na nĩ mana marĩa niĩ itakuũkagĩrwo nĩmo:
english: She perceives that her merchandise is profitable. Her lamp doesn’t go out by night.

kikuyu: Ayahudi arĩa maarĩ kũu Shushani magĩcookanĩrĩra hamwe mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa Adari, nao makĩũraga andũ magana matatũ kũu Shushani. No matiigana gũtaha indo ciao.
english: Mordecai went out of the presence of the king in royal clothing of blue and white, and with a great crown of gold, and with a robe of fine linen and purple; and the city of Susa shouted and was glad.

kikuyu: (Na rĩrĩ, Musa aarĩ mũndũ mwĩnyiihia mũno, mwĩnyiihia gũkĩra andũ arĩa angĩ othe gũkũ thĩ).
english: Moses sent them from the wilderness of Paran according to the commandment of Yahweh. All of them were men who were heads of the children of Israel.

kikuyu: Ndaarĩkia kwaria-rĩ, matiacookaga kwaria; ciugo ciakwa ciatoonyaga matũ mao kahora ihooreire.
english: After my words they didn’t speak again. My speech fell on them.

kikuyu: Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Ta rorai muone, nĩ harĩ na ita rĩroka riumĩte bũrũri wa mwena wa gathigathini; rũrĩrĩ rũnene nĩ rwarahũrĩtwo kuuma ituri-inĩ cia thĩ.
english: Yahweh says, “Behold, a people comes from the north country. A great nation will be stirred up from the uttermost parts of the earth.

kikuyu: Kuuma kũrĩ nuthu ĩrĩa yaheirwo andũ a Isiraeli, Musa agĩthuura mũndũ ũmwe kuuma kũrĩ andũ mĩrongo ĩtano, na nyamũ ĩmwe kuuma kũrĩ nyamũ mĩrongo ĩtano, o ta ũrĩa Jehova aamwathĩte, na agĩcihe Alawii arĩa wĩra wao warĩ kũmenyerera Hema-ĩrĩa-Nyamũre ya Jehova. Ningĩ anene arĩa matongoragia mbũtũ cia ita, acio maathaga ikundi cia o ngiri ngiri, na ikundi cia o igana igana, magĩthiĩ harĩ Musa,
english: even of the children of Israel’s half, Moses took one drawn out of every fifty, both of man and of animal, and gave them to the Levites, who performed the duty of Yahweh’s tabernacle, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

kikuyu: Balamu akĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ, “Wee ikara haha hakuhĩ na iruta rĩaku nyambe thiĩ ngacemanie nake haarĩa.”
english: He said to Balak, “Stand here by your burnt offering, while I meet God over there.”

kikuyu: Ũndũ ũcio wekĩkire nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa waarĩtio na kanua ka mũnabii Isaia ũhinge, rĩrĩa oigire atĩrĩ:
english: But John would have hindered him, saying, “I need to be baptized by you, and you come to me?”

kikuyu: “Ikaragai mwĩhotorete, mwĩhaarĩirie gũtungata, na mũige matawa manyu magĩakanaga,
english: “Let your waist be dressed and your lamps burning.

kikuyu: Mũtumia ũcio agĩciara kahĩĩ na agĩgatua Samusoni. Gagĩkũra, nake Jehova agĩkarathima, 25nake Roho wa Jehova akĩambĩrĩria gũkaarahũra o hĩndĩ ĩyo kaarĩ kũu Mahane-Dani, gatagatĩ ga Zora na Eshitaoli.
english: The woman bore a son and named him Samson. The child grew, and Yahweh blessed him.

kikuyu: Ũndũ ũyũ wonekete nĩ ũndũ wa ũremi wa Jakubu, na nĩ ũndũ wa mehia ma nyũmba ya Isiraeli. Ũremi wa Jakubu-rĩ, nĩ ũrĩkũ? Githĩ ti Samaria? Kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru kwa Juda-rĩ, nĩ kũ? Githĩ ti Jerusalemu?
english: “All this is for the disobedience of Jacob, and for the sins of the house of Israel. What is the disobedience of Jacob? Isn’t it Samaria? And what are the high places of Judah? Aren’t they Jerusalem?

kikuyu: * 45:6 nĩ ta kilomita igĩrĩ na nuthu (2:5)
english: After he is cleansed, they shall reckon to him seven days.

kikuyu: Nĩatwambararĩirie rũhĩa rwa ũhonokio thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Daudi, ndungata yake
english: and has raised up a horn of salvation for us in the house of his servant David

kikuyu: Indo iria aarutire ciarĩ thaani ĩmwe ya betha ya ũritũ wa cekeri igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩtatũ, na mbakũri ĩmwe ya betha ya kũminjaminjĩria ya ũritũ wa cekeri mĩrongo mũgwanja, cierĩ kũringana na gĩthimo gĩa cekeri ya harĩa haamũre, na o ĩmwe ĩiyũrĩtio mũtu ũrĩa mũhinyu mũno ũtukanĩtio na maguta, ũrĩ iruta rĩa mũtu; 62na thaani ĩmwe nene ya thahabu ya ũritũ wa cekeri ikũmi, ĩiyũrĩtio ũbumba;
english: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

kikuyu: “Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo iruta rĩrĩa Harũni na ariũ ake marĩrehagĩra Jehova mũthenya ũrĩa egũitĩrĩrio maguta: nĩ gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa eba ĩmwe ya mũtu ũrĩa mũhinyu mũno, ũrĩ iruta rĩrĩa rĩrutagwo rĩa mũtu, nuthu ĩmwe rũciinĩ na ĩrĩa ĩngĩ hwaĩ-inĩ.
english: “This is the offering of Aaron and of his sons, which they shall offer to Yahweh in the day when he is anointed: one tenth of an ephah† of fine flour for a meal offering perpetually, half of it in the morning, and half of it in the evening.

kikuyu: “Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ, ‘Iruga rĩa ũhiki nĩrĩhaarĩrie no rĩrĩ, arĩa ndĩretire-rĩ, matiraagĩrĩirwo nĩ gũũka.
english: “Then he said to his servants, ‘The wedding is ready, but those who were invited weren’t worthy.

kikuyu: “Athuuri aya, nĩnguona atĩ rũgendo rwitũ nĩ rũgũkorwo na mũtino na rũrehe hathara nene kũrĩ marikabu na mĩrigo o na nginya kũrĩ mĩoyo iitũ yo mĩene.” No mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana rĩmwe, handũ ha gũthikĩrĩria ũrĩa Paũlũ oigaga, aarũmĩrĩire ũtaari wa mũtwarithia wa marikabu o na wa mwene marikabu ĩyo.
english: and said to them, “Sirs, I perceive that the voyage will be with injury and much loss, not only of the cargo and the ship, but also of our lives.”

kikuyu: “ ‘Mũndũ mũrũme angĩkoma na mũndũ-wa-nja hĩndĩ yake ya mweri, nĩaguũria riurĩro rĩake, o nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agakĩguũria riurĩro rĩa thakame yake. Andũ acio eerĩ nĩmakaingatwo kuuma kũrĩ andũ ao.
english: men who have erred concerning the truth, saying that the resurrection is already past, and overthrowing the faith of some.

kikuyu: Ndũkandunye kiugo kĩa ma kuuma kanua-inĩ gakwa, nĩgũkorwo njigĩte mwĩhoko wakwa mawatho-inĩ maku.
english: Don’t snatch the word of truth out of my mouth, for I put my hope in your ordinances.

kikuyu: no roho o wothe ũrĩa ũtoimbũraga Jesũ, ũcio nduumĩte kũrĩ Ngai. Ũcio nĩ roho wa mũmena-Kristũ, ũrĩa mũiguĩte atĩ nĩũgooka na o na rĩu nĩũrĩkĩtie gũũka gũkũ thĩ.
english: and every spirit who doesn’t confess that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is not of God; and this is the spirit of the Antichrist, of whom you have heard that it comes. Now it is in the world already.

kikuyu: “Agĩcookia atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩ ũthũ na niĩ wekire ũguo.’ “Ndungata icio ikĩmũũria atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩũkwenda tũthiĩ, tũkarĩmunye?’
english: Peter answered him and said, “Lord, if it is you, command me to come to you on the waters.”

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aakinyire mũciĩ-rĩ, akĩoya kahiũ agĩtinangia thuriya yake kĩĩga o kĩĩga icunjĩ ikũmi na igĩrĩ, agĩcitũma ngʼongo ciothe cia Isiraeli,
english: When he had come into his house, he took a knife and cut up his concubine, and divided her, limb by limb, into twelve pieces, and sent her throughout all the borders of Israel.

kikuyu: O na mbwe nĩciongithagia ciana ciacio, no andũ akwa matuĩkĩte andũ matarĩ tha, o ta nyaga cia werũ-inĩ.
english: Even the jackals offer their breast. They nurse their young ones. But the daughter of my people has become cruel, like the ostriches in the wilderness.

kikuyu: Akorwo ti ũguo-rĩ, mwathiĩte kuona kĩ? Hihi nĩ mũndũ wehumbĩte nguo njega? Aca, arĩa mehumbaga nguo njega makoragwo thĩinĩ wa nyũmba cia ũthamaki.
english: But what did you go out to see? A man in soft clothing? Behold, those who wear soft clothing are in kings’ houses.

kikuyu: Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Abba, Baba, maũndũ mothe nĩmahotekaga nĩwe. Njehereria gĩkombe gĩkĩ. No ti ũrĩa ngwenda niĩ, no nĩ ũrĩa wee ũkwenda.” Ningĩ agĩcooka harĩ arutwo ake akĩmakora makomete. Akĩũria Petero atĩrĩ, “Simoni, kaĩ ũkomete? Ndũngĩhota gũikara ithaa rĩmwe wĩiguĩte?
english: He said, “Abba,‡ Father, all things are possible to you. Please remove this cup from me. However, not what I desire, but what you desire.”

kikuyu: Matikanatigie gacunjĩ o na kamwe karaare nginya rũciinĩ kana moine ihĩndĩ rĩako o na rĩmwe. Rĩrĩa megũkũngũĩra Gĩathĩ-kĩa-Bathaka ĩyo no nginya marũmagĩrĩre mũtabarĩre wakĩo wothe. No mũndũ angĩkorwo ndarĩ na thaahu, na ndathiĩte rũgendo, na aage gũkũngũĩra Gĩathĩ-kĩa-Bathaka, mũndũ ũcio nĩakaingatwo athengio kuuma kũrĩ andũ ao, nĩ ũndũ ndaareheire Jehova indo iria arutagĩrwo ihinda rĩrĩa rĩtuĩtwo. Mũndũ ũcio nĩagacookererwo nĩ mehia make mwene.
english: “The Levites shall lay their hands on the heads of the bulls, and you shall offer the one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering to Yahweh, to make atonement for the Levites.

kikuyu: O ihinda rĩu, andũ a Juda makiuga atĩrĩ, “Aruti a wĩra nĩmaroorwo nĩ hinya, na nĩ kũrĩ na mahuti maingĩ mũno matangĩreka twake rũthingo rũu rĩngĩ.”
english: Next to them, Jedaiah the son of Harumaph made repairs across from his house. Next to him, Hattush the son of Hashabneiah made repairs.

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ ihenya ndakahota kwĩhonokia. Ũrĩa ũrĩ hinya ndagateithio nĩ hinya ũcio wake, nayo njamba ya ita ndĩkahonokia muoyo wayo.
english: Flight will perish from the swift. The strong won’t strengthen his force. The mighty won’t deliver himself.

kikuyu: Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũtũmaga Ayahudi arĩa maatũũraga tũtũũra-inĩ marũmie mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa Adari, ũrĩ mũthenya wa gĩkeno na wa ndĩa, na mũthenya wa kũheana iheo harĩ mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ.
english: Therefore the Jews of the villages, who live in the unwalled towns, make the fourteenth day of the month Adar a day of gladness and feasting, a holiday, and a day of sending presents of food to one another.

kikuyu: “ ‘No gũtirĩ kĩndũ kĩa mũndũ kĩrĩa aamũrĩire Jehova, arĩ mũndũ, kana nyamũ, kana mũgũnda wa nyũmba yao, kĩngĩendio kana gĩkũũrwo; indo ciothe ciamũrĩirwo Jehova nĩ nyamũre harĩ Jehova.
english: “ ‘Notwithstanding, no devoted thing that a man devotes to Yahweh of all that he has, whether of man or animal, or of the field of his possession, shall be sold or redeemed. Everything that is permanently devoted is most holy to Yahweh.

kikuyu: Thikagĩrĩria thoguo, we ũrĩa wagũciarire, na ndũkanyarare maitũguo, o na aakorwo nĩ mũkũrũ.
english: Listen to your father who gave you life, and don’t despise your mother when she is old.

kikuyu: Wee Jehova, rĩrĩa wanyonirie ũtugi waku-rĩ, watũmire ndĩhaande o ta kĩrĩma; no rĩrĩa wahithire ũthiũ waku-rĩ, nĩndamakire.
english: I will be glad and rejoice in your loving kindness, for you have seen my affliction. You have known my soul in adversities.

kikuyu: Hĩba ĩno nĩ mũira, na gĩtugĩ gĩkĩ nĩ mũira, atĩ ndigakĩra hĩba ĩno njũke mwena waku ngũgere ngero, na atĩ nawe ndũgakĩra hĩba ĩno, kana ũkĩre gĩtugĩ gĩkĩ ũũke mwena wakwa ũngere ngero.
english: May this heap be a witness, and the pillar be a witness, that I will not pass over this heap to you, and that you will not pass over this heap and this pillar to me, for harm.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo ciimba cia andũ acio nĩigatuĩka nyama cia kũrĩĩo nĩ nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ, o na nyamũ cia gĩthaka, na gũtigakorwo o na mũndũ ũmwe wa gũcirira. Ningĩ nĩnganiina mĩgambo ya gĩkeno na ya kũrũũhia, na mĩgambo ya gĩkeno kĩa mũhiki na mũhikania kũu matũũra-inĩ ma Juda, o na njĩra-inĩ cia Jerusalemu, nĩ ũndũ bũrũri ũcio nĩũgakira ihooru.
english: The dead bodies of this people will be food for the birds of the sky, and for the animals of the earth. No one will frighten them away.  or, seed

kikuyu: Thikĩrĩria, wee mũrũ wakwa, na wĩtĩkĩre ũrĩa ngũkwĩra, nĩgeetha mĩaka ya muoyo waku ĩingĩhe.
english: Therefore, brothers,‡ be more diligent to make your calling and election sure. For if you do these things, you will never stumble.

kikuyu: “Umai kũu thĩinĩ warĩo, inyuĩ andũ akwa! Mwĩtharei, mũhonokie mĩoyo yanyu! Mwĩtharei, mweherere marakara marĩa mahiũ ma Jehova.
english: “My people, go away from the middle of her, and each of you save yourselves from Yahweh’s fierce anger.

kikuyu: O na ndwarekire mumunye ciana cia ciana ciakwa, kana njugĩre airĩtu akwa ũhoro. Nĩwĩkĩte ũndũ wa ũrimũ.
english: and didn’t allow me to kiss my sons and my daughters? Now you have done foolishly.

kikuyu: Niĩ-rĩ, ndĩ iria rĩa maaĩ, kana nyamũ ĩrĩa nene ĩtũũraga iria thĩinĩ kũrĩa kũriku, atĩ nĩkĩo nangagĩrwo?
english: Is my strength the strength of stones? Or is my flesh of bronze?

kikuyu: Ariũ a Juda maarĩ: Eri, na Onani, na Shela, na Perezu, na Zera (no Eri na Onani nĩmakuĩrĩire bũrũri wa Kaanani.) Nao ariũ a Perezu maarĩ: Hezironi na Hamuli.
english: The sons of Judah: Er, Onan, Shelah, Perez, and Zerah; but Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan. The sons of Perez were Hezron and Hamul.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli magĩkuhĩrĩria andũ a Benjamini mũthenya wa keerĩ.
english: The children of Israel came near against the children of Benjamin the second day.

kikuyu: Wagarũrire kĩgirĩko gĩakwa gĩgĩtuĩka rwĩmbo rwa gĩkeno; ũkĩnduta nguo yakwa ya ikũnia, ũkĩhumba gĩkeno,
english: Because of all my adversaries I have become utterly contemptible to my neighbors, a horror to my acquaintances. Those who saw me on the street fled from me.

kikuyu: O na inyuĩ noguo: Rĩu nĩ ihinda rĩanyu rĩa kĩeha, no nĩngamuona rĩngĩ na nĩmũgakena, na gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũkaamũtunya gĩkeno kĩu.
english: Therefore you now have sorrow, but I will see you again, and your heart will rejoice, and no one will take your joy away from you.

kikuyu: Ikundi cia agendi nĩithaamaga njĩra ciacio, ikambata werũ-inĩ, igathirĩra kuo.
english: For he wounds and binds up. He injures and his hands make whole.

kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ angĩ manyiihio, nawe ũkoiga, ‘Nĩmatũũgĩrio!’ Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩakahonokia arĩa makuĩte ngoro.
english: When they cast down, you will say, ‘be lifted up.’ He will save the humble person.

kikuyu: Nũũ ũkoragwo amwĩrĩte mũndutĩre magongona macio rĩrĩa mũgũũka mbere yakwa kũũhooya, mũkĩrangaga nja cia nyũmba yakwa?
english: When you come to appear before me, who has required this at your hand, to trample my courts?

kikuyu: Maaĩ macio maambatire makĩhumbĩra irĩma na makĩria ma buti mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.*
english: Of the birds after their kind, of the livestock after their kind, of every creeping thing of the ground after its kind, two of every sort will come to you, to keep them alive.

kikuyu: Rĩu-rĩ, nĩ inyuĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ ndĩraarĩria. Tondũ ndĩ mũtũmwo ũtũmĩtwo kũrĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ- rĩ, ũtungata ũcio wakwa nĩndĩwĩkĩrĩire mũno,
english: For I speak to you who are Gentiles. Since then as I am an apostle to Gentiles, I glorify my ministry,

kikuyu: Petero akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ta njĩĩra atĩrĩ, ici nĩcio mbeeca iria wee na Anania mũrendirie gĩthaka?” Nake mũtumia ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ, nĩcio tũrendirie.”
english: Peter answered her, “Tell me whether you sold the land for so much.” She said, “Yes, for so much.”

kikuyu: Igua ihooya rĩakwa, Wee Jehova, thikĩrĩria kĩrĩro gĩakwa ũnjiguĩre tha; ũka ũndeithie, nĩ ũndũ wa wĩhokeku waku na ũthingu waku.
english: Hear my prayer, Yahweh. Listen to my petitions. In your faithfulness and righteousness, relieve me.

kikuyu: Tũma mamenye atĩ kũu nĩ guoko gwaku, mamenye atĩ Wee Jehova, nĩwe wĩkĩte ũguo.
english: that they may know that this is your hand; that you, Yahweh, have done it.

kikuyu: Nĩamenyithirie Musa njĩra ciake, nacio ciĩko ciake agĩcimenyithia andũ a Isiraeli:
english: He made known his ways to Moses, his deeds to the children of Israel.

kikuyu: Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Ngai akĩmarekereria marũmagĩrĩre merirĩria mao mooru marĩa ngoro ciao cieriragĩria, o na mekage maũndũ ma ũmaraya ma kwagithia mĩĩrĩ yao gĩtĩĩo, mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ.
english: Therefore God also gave them up in the lusts of their hearts to uncleanness, that their bodies should be dishonored among themselves;

kikuyu: inĩrai Jehova na kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto, mũmũinĩre na kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto o na mũgambo ũrĩa mwega mũno,
english: For Yahweh is good. His loving kindness endures forever, his faithfulness to all generations.

kikuyu: Ihinda o ro rĩu maaragia nake, ndungata iria ciarĩ hakũre cia mũthamaki igĩkinya, na igĩtwara Hamani na ihenya iruga-inĩ rĩrĩa Esiteri aamarugithĩirie.
english: While they were yet talking with him, the king’s eunuchs came, and hurried to bring Haman to the banquet that Esther had prepared.

kikuyu: Ndĩ ndirica-inĩ ya nyũmba yakwa-rĩ, nĩndacũthĩrĩirie na nja kamwanya-inĩ,
english: For at the window of my house, I looked out through my lattice.

kikuyu: Mũtikanaheenio: Ngai ndangĩnyũrũrio. Kĩrĩa mũndũ ahaandaga no kĩo agethaga.
english: Don’t be deceived. God is not mocked, for whatever a man sows, that he will also reap.

kikuyu: na ngoragwo ndĩ thĩinĩ wake, itarĩ na ũthingu wakwa mwene ũrĩa uumanaga na watho, no ũkorwo arĩ ũthingu ũrĩa uumanaga na gwĩtĩkia Kristũ; ũguo nĩ kuuga, ũthingu ũrĩa uumaga kũrĩ Ngai, na wonekaga na ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia.
english: Therefore God also highly exalted him, and gave to him the name which is above every name,

kikuyu: Rũciinĩ agĩtangĩka meciiria, na nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtũmanĩra andũ-ago othe na andũ arĩa oogĩ a Misiri. Firaũni akĩmeera irooto ciake, no gũtirĩ wao o na ũmwe wahotire kũmũtaũrĩra.
english: In the morning, his spirit was troubled, and he sent and called for all of Egypt’s magicians and wise men. Pharaoh told them his dreams, but there was no one who could interpret them to Pharaoh.

kikuyu: Thigari icio cia mbarathi ciakinya Kaisarea, ikĩnengera barũthi marũa na ikĩneana Paũlũ kũrĩ we. Nake barũthi aathoma marũa, akĩũria kũrĩa Paũlũ oimĩte. Rĩrĩa aamenyire atĩ oimĩte Kilikia,
english: When they came to Caesarea and delivered the letter to the governor, they also presented Paul to him.

kikuyu: Ũyũ nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa Musa aaheete mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi, kũringana na ũrĩa mbarĩ ciao ciatariĩ: Nĩ bũrũri wa Jazeri, na matũũra mothe ma Gileadi, na nuthu ya bũrũri wa andũ a Amoni o nginya Aroeri, gũkuhĩ na Raba;
english: Moses gave to the tribe of Gad, to the children of Gad, according to their families.

kikuyu: “Rĩu-rĩ, mũgwĩciiria atĩa? Mũndũ angĩkorwo arĩ na ngʼondu igana rĩmwe, na ĩmwe yacio yũre- rĩ, githĩ ndangĩtiga icio mĩrongo kenda na kenda kũu irĩma-inĩ, athiĩ agacarie ĩyo yũrĩte? Na angĩmĩona-rĩ, ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, akenagĩra ngʼondu ĩyo ĩmwe ĩrorĩte kũrĩ ũrĩa akenagĩra icio mĩrongo kenda na kenda itaroorĩte.
english: For there are eunuchs who were born that way from their mother’s womb, and there are eunuchs who were made eunuchs by men; and there are eunuchs who made themselves eunuchs for the Kingdom of Heaven’s sake. He who is able to receive it, let him receive it.”

kikuyu: ya Joiaribu, aarĩ Matenai; ya Jedaia, aarĩ Uzi;
english: of Joiarib, Mattenai; of Jedaiah, Uzzi;

kikuyu: Honokia ũndute mũtondo-inĩ, ndũkareke ndoonyerere; ndeithũra kuuma kũrĩ arĩa maathũire, ũndute kuuma maaĩ-inĩ marĩa mariku.
english: But I will always hope, and will add to all of your praise.

kikuyu: “Atĩrĩrĩ, wee Lemueli, athamaki matiagĩrĩirwo nĩkũnyua ndibei, ti mũtugo wa athamaki kũnyua ndibei, anene matiagĩrĩirwo nĩ kwĩrirĩria njoohi,
english: It is not for kings, Lemuel, it is not for kings to drink wine, nor for princes to say, ‘Where is strong drink?’

kikuyu: “Nĩngonania riiri wakwa ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ, nacio ndũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩikoona iherithia rĩrĩa ngaarehe, o na guoko kũrĩa ngaamaigĩrĩra.
english: “I will set my glory among the nations. Then all the nations will see my judgment that I have executed, and my hand that I have laid on them.

kikuyu: na gategwa kamwe, na ndũrũme ĩmwe, na gatũrũme kamwe ka mwaka ũmwe, nĩ ũndũ wa iruta rĩa njino;
english: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

kikuyu: O na kũngĩtuĩka Babuloni gwĩtũũgĩrĩtie gũgakinya o matu-inĩ, na ciĩhitho ciakuo ikairigĩrwo na hinya mũno-rĩ, no ngaakũrehithĩria aniinani magũũkĩrĩre,” * 51:51 Rĩĩrĩ nĩ ihinda rĩrĩa Nebukadinezaru aingĩrire thĩinĩ wa hekarũ na akĩmĩthaahia mwaka wa
english: Though Babylon should mount up to the sky, and though she should fortify the height of her strength, yet destroyers will come to her from me,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: Ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo cionagwo ihaana ta makara megwakana mwaki kana ta imũrĩ. Mwaki ũcio wathiiaga thuutha na mbere gatagatĩ-inĩ ga ciũmbe icio; warĩ mũcangararu, na rũheni rwahenũkaga kuuma harĩ guo.
english: As for the likeness of the living creatures, their appearance was like burning coals of fire, like the appearance of torches. The fire went up and down among the living creatures. The fire was bright, and lightning went out of the fire.

kikuyu: nake Isaaka ngĩmũhe Jakubu na Esaũ. Nĩndagaĩire Esaũ bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Seiru, no Jakubu na ariũ ake magĩikũrũka magĩthiĩ Misiri.
english: I gave to Isaac Jacob and Esau: and I gave to Esau Mount Seir, to possess it. Jacob and his children went down into Egypt.

kikuyu: Nĩatheecire ngoro yakwa na mĩguĩ kuuma thiaka-inĩ wake.
english: It is because of the sins of her prophets and the iniquities of her priests,

kikuyu: nakuo gũtũ gwaku ũgũtegere ũũgĩ, na werekerie ngoro yaku kũgĩa na ũmenyi,
english: for they will add to you length of days, years of life, and peace.

kikuyu: “Nĩmũiguĩte atĩ hĩndĩ ya tene andũ nĩmerirwo atĩrĩ, ‘Ndũkanoragane, na mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũkooragana no nginya agaatuĩka wa gũtuĩrwo ciira.’ No niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, ũrĩa wothe ũkarakarĩra mũrũ wa ithe nĩagatuĩka wa gũtuĩrwo ciira. Na ningĩ-rĩ, mũndũ ũrĩa wothe wĩraga mũrũ wa ithe atĩrĩ, * 4:25 Dekapoli nĩ kuuga “Matũũra Ikũmi.”
english: Going on from there, he saw two other brothers, James the son of Zebedee, and John his brother, in the boat with Zebedee their father, mending their nets. He called them.
